title: New Superconductors in the PtPb$_3$Bi Structure Type
summary: The quest for new superconductors is of both fundamental and technological importance. Recently, an artificial intelligence method correctly predicted PtPb$_3$Bi to be a superconductor. In this work, we find superconductivity in the newly synthesized $M$Pb$_{4-x}$Bi$_x$ ($M$ = Au, Pd, and Rh), of which PtPb$_3$Bi is a member. When $M$ = Ni, whose radius is considerably smaller, the structure instead collapses into the different, Pb-substituted NiBi$_3$ type. Interestingly, the stoichiometric parameter $x$ shifts across the three compounds to keep the total valence electron count close to 20 per formula unit. The superconducting transitions occur at 4.9, 4.2, and 3.4 K, for $M$ = Au, Pd, and Rh, respectively. Using electrical resistivity, magnetization, and specific heat measurements, we establish the bulk nature of the superconducting state and determine the critical fields, characteristic length scales, and anisotropy ratios. All three compounds are moderately anisotropic type-II superconductors, with modest upper critical field anisotropies of $H_{c2}^{\parallel c}/H_{c2}^{\perp c} \approx 1.2$ to $1.5$. These results establish $M$Pb$_{4-x}$Bi$_x$ as a family of anisotropic superconductors and a platform for studying how site disorder and Pb-Bi mixing govern superconductivity in heavy-element intermetallics.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了通过人工智能方法预测的PtPb$_3$Bi超导体所属的$M$Pb$_{4-x}$Bi$_x$（$M$ = Au, Pd, Rh）家族中新合成了三种各向异性II类超导体，其超导转变温度分别为4.9、4.2和3.4 K，并系统表征了其超导态性质。
AI.motivation: 寻找新型超导体具有基础科学和技术应用的双重重要性，尤其是利用人工智能方法预测新超导体后，需要实验验证并扩展相关材料家族。
AI.method: 合成了$M$Pb$_{4-x}$Bi$_x$（$M$ = Au, Pd, Rh, Ni）系列化合物，通过电阻率、磁化率和比热测量表征超导态，分析元素半径对结构的影响以及化学计量参数x的变化规律。
AI.result: 发现$M$ = Au, Pd, Rh时超导转变温度分别为4.9、4.2和3.4 K；$M$ = Ni因半径较小导致结构塌缩为不同的NiBi$_3$类型；三种化合物均为中等各向异性的II类超导体，上临界场各向异性比$H_{c2}^{\parallel c}/H_{c2}^{\perp c} \approx 1.2$–1.5。
AI.conclusion: $M$Pb$_{4-x}$Bi$_x$是一类各向异性超导体家族，为研究重元素金属间化合物中位点无序和Pb-Bi混合对超导电性的调控提供了平台。

title: Fluctuation-Induced Magnetoelectric Effect in Noncentrosymmetric Superconductors
comment: Prepared for the special issue of Low Temperature Physics dedicated to the memory of Ernst Pashitskii [10 pages, 7 figures]
summary: We study the effect of superconducting fluctuations on the spin susceptibility and NMR relaxation rate in noncentrosymmetric two-dimensional materials above the superconducting transition temperature, considering arbitrary strength of impurity scattering. Employing a microscopic model with linear Rashba spin-orbit coupling, we show that superconducting fluctuations give rise to a direct contribution to the spin susceptibility through fluctuation-induced Cooper pairs. This fluctuation-driven magnetoelectric effect is possible even for purely $s$-wave singlet pairing, a mechanism that is forbidden in centrosymmetric systems. It competes with the reduction of the susceptibility below the Pauli value arising from the combined effects of the suppression of the density of states and quantum-interference localization processes. In contrast, superconducting fluctuations enhance the NMR relaxation rate above its normal-state Korringa value, with spin-orbit coupling providing an additional amplification of this effect.

AI.tldr: 研究了非中心对称二维材料中超导涨落对自旋磁化率和NMR弛豫率的影响，发现涨落驱动的磁电效应即使在纯s波单态配对中也能发生，这在中心对称系统中是被禁止的。
AI.motivation: 探索非中心对称二维材料中超导涨落导致的磁电效应，该效应在中心对称系统中不存在，揭示自旋-轨道耦合与超导涨落的相互作用。
AI.method: 采用具有线性Rashba自旋-轨道耦合的微观模型，考虑任意杂质散射强度，在超导转变温度以上区域分析超导涨落对自旋磁化率和NMR弛豫率的影响。
AI.result: 超导涨落通过涨落诱导的库珀对直接贡献自旋磁化率，产生磁电效应；该效应与态密度抑制和量子干涉局域化导致的磁化率降低相竞争。同时超导涨落增强NMR弛豫率，自旋-轨道耦合进一步放大该效应。
AI.conclusion: 非中心对称体系中超导涨落可产生中心对称系统中禁戒的磁电效应，自旋-轨道耦合对NMR弛豫率有额外增强作用。

title: Quasiclassical theory of nonlinear response in d-wave superconductors
summary: We use a self-consistent Keldysh--Nambu quasiclassical theory to study two related nonlinear phenomena in clean d-wave superconductors: the photo-induced static correction to the order parameter -- the Eliashberg effect -- and third-harmonic generation. Both follow from a systematic perturbative solution of the out-of-equilibrium Eilenberger equation for the Keldysh propagator. For the steady-state correction to the pairing amplitude we find that at temperatures close to the critical temperature and to leading order in the gap magnitude $Δ$, the photo-induced change of the order parameter is zero at all drive frequencies: in contrast to s-wave superconductors, a clean d-wave superconductor exhibits no Eliashberg enhancement at this order. The gap-enhancing quasiparticle-redistribution channel that drives the effect in the s-wave case is suppressed by an additional power of $Δ$ in the d-wave case. For third-harmonic generation we find that the charge-density-fluctuation (particle--hole) channel significantly dominates the Schmid--Higgs amplitude-mode contribution over a broad frequency range, the two becoming comparable only in a narrow window near the resonance frequency $ω\approx 2\sqrt{2}\,Δ$ if one neglects the diamagnetic part of the current in the normal state. We trace this to the nonequilibrium dynamics of nodal quasiparticles, which must be retained explicitly and which also makes the response sensitive to the orientation of the driving field.

AI.tldr: 本文利用自洽的Keldysh-Nambu准经典理论，研究了清洁d波超导体中的两种非线性现象：Eliashberg效应（光致静态序参量修正）和三次谐波产生。研究发现，在接近临界温度时，d波超导体在主导阶不存在Eliashberg增强（与s波超导体不同），而三次谐波产生中电荷密度涨落通道显著主导Schmid-Higgs振幅模贡献。
AI.motivation: 探索d波超导体（如高温超导体）在非平衡态下的非线性光学响应，特别是光致静态序参量修正（Eliashberg效应）和三次谐波产生，以揭示d波超导体与s波超导体在这些现象上的本质差异。
AI.method: 采用自洽的Keldysh-Nambu准经典理论，通过系统微扰求解非平衡Eilenberger方程（Keldysh传播子），研究清洁d波超导体的非线性光学响应。
AI.result: 1) 在接近临界温度且主导阶近似下，清洁d波超导体无Eliashberg增强（与s波不同），因为d波中增强间隙的准粒子重分布通道被额外Δ因子抑制。2) 三次谐波产生中，电荷密度涨落（粒子-空穴）通道在宽频率范围内显著主导Schmid-Higgs振幅模贡献，两者仅在ω≈2√2Δ附近可比拟（若忽略正常态抗磁电流）。
AI.conclusion: d波超导体的节点准粒子非平衡动力学是导致其与s波超导体在非线性光学响应上本质差异的关键，且响应依赖于驱动场的方向。

title: High temperature transitions in Ruddlesden-Popper nickelates La$_{n+1}$Ni$_{n}$O$_{3n+1}$
summary: The discovery of superconductivity at $15\,\mathrm{K}$ in the infinite-layer nickelate $(\mathrm{Nd},\mathrm{Sr})\mathrm{NiO}_2$, followed by superconductivity at $80\,\mathrm{K}$ in the Ruddlesden--Popper phase $\mathrm{La}_3\mathrm{Ni}_2\mathrm{O}_7$, has ushered in a new era of nickelate research. Despite this progress, large discrepancies between reports exist. Here, we investigate the complete series of bulk-stable $\mathrm{La}_{n+1}\mathrm{Ni}_n\mathrm{O}_{3n+1}$ compounds using a comprehensive set of experimental techniques, including PXRD, single-crystal XRD, electron microscopy, heat capacity, differential scanning calorimetry, magnetic susceptibility, and transport measurements, over a broad temperature range from $2$ to $1000\,\mathrm{K}$. By studying high-quality single crystals, we identify a previously underappreciated high-temperature phase transition in Ruddlesden--Popper nickelates $\mathrm{La}_{n+1}\mathrm{Ni}_n\mathrm{O}_{3n+1}$ distinct from the one going to a tetragonal phase.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了La_{n+1}Ni_nO_{3n+1}系列镍酸盐从2K到1000K的物性，发现了一个此前被忽视的高温相变。
AI.motivation: 镍基超导（无限层镍酸盐15K超导、Ruddlesden-Popper相80K超导）领域存在大量报道不一致的问题，需要系统澄清。
AI.method: 综合运用PXRD、单晶XRD、电子显微镜、热容、DSC、磁化率、输运测量等多种实验手段，研究高质量单晶。
AI.result: 在Ruddlesden-Popper镍酸盐La_{n+1}Ni_nO_{3n+1}中发现了一个不同于四方相转变的高温相变。
AI.conclusion: 该高温相变此前未被充分认识，对理解镍基超导体系具有重要意义。

title: pyDOF: a Python library for the design of discrete forward and inverse filters
summary: In this work, we present pyDOF, a Python-based software library which provides a domain-specific framework for the design of symmetric, physical-space, forward as well as inverse discrete filters. pyDOF is based on a constrained optimisation framework developed in our previous work [1, 2]. This framework allows the user to impose a wide range of constraints on the discrete filter transfer-function such as monotonicity, positivity, value-fixing, gradient-smoothing etc. amongst many others. pyDOF additionally includes an adaptive filter stencil selection option, and a van Cittert-based inverse-filter design with a user-controlled reconstruction order. The filter coefficients are computed automatically, and saved to a plain text file which can be readily parsed by any programming language. pyDOF can be used to design a wide range of low-pass, high-pass, multi band-pass/band-stop etc. discrete filters. In addition, due to its generality and abstraction, pyDOF can be used to design specific filters for user-defined target filter transfer functions. Although developed primarily for application to computational fluid dynamics simulations, pyDOF can be used to design discrete filters for a wide range of signal processing applications.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了 pyDOF——一个基于 Python 的离散滤波器设计软件库，它利用约束优化框架支持对称、物理空间的前向和逆向离散滤波器设计，具备自适应模板选择、van Cittert 逆滤波、多种约束（单调性、正定性等）功能，可生成低通、高通、多带通/带阻等多种滤波器，主要面向计算流体动力学（CFD）应用，但也可用于通用信号处理。
AI.motivation: 为计算流体动力学及其他信号处理领域提供一个灵活、通用、可定制约束的离散滤波器设计工具，解决现有工具在滤波器约束类型、自适应性和逆滤波设计方面的不足。
AI.method: 基于前期工作 [1,2] 提出的约束优化框架，通过 Python 实现 pyDOF 软件库。支持用户施加单调性、正定性、值固定、梯度平滑等多种约束；提供自适应滤波器模板选择；集成 van Cittert 逆滤波方法并允许用户控制重建阶数；滤波器系数自动计算并保存为纯文本文件。
AI.result: pyDOF 能够自动设计低通、高通、多带通/带阻等多种离散滤波器，支持用户自定义目标传递函数，滤波器系数以纯文本格式输出，便于跨语言调用。
AI.conclusion: pyDOF 是一个通用、抽象的离散滤波器设计库，虽主要面向 CFD 应用，但可扩展到广泛的信号处理场景。

title: Consistent Initial States with Constant Circuit Depth for Quantum Computational Chemistry
summary: Variational quantum eigensolvers have been extensively studied, yet there are still no methods that offer black-box applicability with consistent performance. Separable pair approximations promise to be candidates for such methods: they compile to shallow constant-depth quantum circuits with linear gate count and parameter dependence and circumvent most bottlenecks of variational quantum algorithms through their classical simulability. At the same time, they seamlessly integrate into prominent more general circuit designs and subspace strategies. So far, their capability as a consistent method has only been indicated and demonstrations have been restricted to manually designed model systems. In this work, we extensively evaluate the consistency of SPA states for hydrogen chains, alkanes, and small molecules within an orbital-optimized VQE framework. Our benchmarks demonstrate consistent approximations with classical complexity comparable to Hartree-Fock. Our open-source implementation within the Tequila framework allows convenient use of the algorithms as a standalone method or as a subpart of more extensive procedures. Our results underpin the potential of SPA circuits as scalable, chemically motivated low-depth circuits with various applications and validate their usage as a chemically consistent method.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了可分离对近似(SPA)在变分量子本征求解器中的一致性表现，证明其具有与Hartree-Fock相当的经典复杂度，且可作为黑盒方法应用于量子化学计算。
AI.motivation: 变分量子本征求解器(VQE)缺乏能够提供黑盒式应用且性能一致的方法，现有方法存在各种瓶颈，亟需一种可靠、一致且可扩展的量子化学计算方法。
AI.method: 在轨道优化的VQE框架下，对氢链、烷烃和小分子系统进行基准测试，使用开源的Tequila框架实现SPA方法，评估其作为独立方法或更复杂程序子部分的性能一致性。
AI.result: SPA状态在多个化学体系（氢链、烷烃、小分子）中展现出一致的近似性能，经典计算复杂度与Hartree-Fock方法相当，且可编译为浅层常数深度量子电路。
AI.conclusion: SPA电路具有作为可扩展、化学动机明确的低深度量子电路的潜力，可用作一致性化学计算方法，支撑了其在量子化学中的广泛应用前景。

title: Odd transport in a two-temperature Brownian dimer
summary: We investigate a two-temperature Brownian dimer with odd mobility, characterized by antisymmetric transport coefficients, as a controlled paradigm for odd nonequilibrium dynamics. The system is made of two harmonically confined particles coupled by an elastic spring and connected to reservoirs at different temperatures. Odd mobility converts conservative forces into transverse motion, linking heat exchange to circulating probability currents without requiring external torques, spatial anisotropy, or nonconservative driving. Our exact solution shows that odd mobility creates handed correlations between the two particles while leaving the individual particle distributions isotropic. These correlations arise only when temperature imbalance, elastic coupling, and odd mobility act together, and their handedness reverses when the odd response is reversed. The steady probability current contains two distinct parts: the ordinary irreversible current of a two-temperature dimer and an additional handed contribution generated by odd mobility. When projected onto the motion of each particle, this handed contribution becomes a pair of counter-rotating circulating currents inside the traps. Based on the currents we compute the heat transfer and entropy production analytically. We show that odd mobility enhances thermal conductance between the reservoirs, while the net heat current and total dissipation remain unchanged under reversal of the odd handedness.

AI.tldr: 研究了一个具有奇数迁移率的双温布朗二聚体，发现奇数迁移率会引发手性关联和环形概率流，并增强热导，但净热流和总耗散在奇手性反转下不变。
AI.motivation: 将奇数迁移率（反对称输运系数）作为奇数非平衡动力学的受控范式，研究其在双温体系中的基本效应，填补该方向的理论空白。
AI.method: 构建由两个简谐束缚粒子通过弹性弹簧耦合、分别连接不同温度热库的二聚体模型，通过精确求解得到稳态概率分布、概率流、热传递和熵产生等物理量的解析表达式。
AI.result: 奇数迁移率在无需外力矩或空间各向异性的条件下，产生手性粒子关联和反向旋转的环形概率流；奇数迁移率增强热导，但净热流和总耗散在奇手性反转下保持不变。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了奇数迁移率、温度不平衡和弹性耦合三者协同产生手性非平衡动力学的基本机制，为理解奇数输运在热力学过程中的作用提供了理论框架。

title: The fate of odd-parity magnetism in one dimension
summary: We consider a one-dimensional model for a $p$-wave magnet within the bosonization framework. The model consists of itinerant electrons described by an extended Hubbard model coupled to a chain of localized moments through the Kondo exchange. The classical ground state of the local-moment system captures the salient features of an odd-parity magnet. By bosonizing the coupled system, a description in terms of coupled Luttinger liquids follows, giving rise to a rich weak-coupling phase diagram. It is shown that the spin chain develops quasi long-range order consistent with the combined time-reversal and translation symmetry defining the $p$-wave magnet. We highlight the peculiar role played by this order in establishing a commensurability condition on the electronic filling under which additional interactions appear in the bosonic field theory. It is demonstrated that these interactions endow the electron spectral function with a pronounced $p$-wave character. Away from commensurate filling, these interactions are rendered irrelevant and the ensuing $p$-wave character is lost.

AI.tldr: 本文通过玻色化框架研究了一维p-波磁体模型，揭示了自旋链呈现准长程序，并在特定电子填充下电子谱函数表现出p-波特性，远离该填充时则消失。
AI.motivation: 作者旨在理解一维p-波磁体中巡游电子与局域磁矩耦合系统的物理行为，特别是探索p-波磁序对电子谱函数的影响及其对电子填充的依赖关系。
AI.method: 采用玻色化方法处理由扩展Hubbard模型描述的巡游电子与通过Kondo耦合链接的局域磁矩链组成的系统，推导出耦合Luttinger液体的弱耦合相图。
AI.result: 自旋链发展出与时间反演-平移联合对称性一致的准长程序；在特定电子填充（满足公度条件）下，额外相互作用使电子谱函数呈现显著的p-波特征；远离公度填充时，这些相互作用成为无关项，p-波特征消失。
AI.conclusion: p-波磁体的准长程序与电子填充公度条件共同决定了电子系统是否表现出p-波特征，这为理解一维奇宇称磁体中的电子行为提供了理论依据。

title: Anomalous Hall viscosity of altermagnets
summary: We show that the phonon Hall viscosity at zero magnetic field is a natural probe of altermagnetism. First, we demonstrate that the finite elements of the Hall viscosity tensor unambiguously distinguish altermagnets from ferromagnets and conventional antiferromagnets. We then microscopically compute the Hall viscosity in models for d-wave and g-wave altermagnets, and find a strong sensitivity to electronic spectrum features such as gapped Dirac points and Lifshitz transitions. This sensitivity reflects a strain-space Berry curvature monopole, which contrast to the multipolar character of the standard momentum-space Berry curvature in altermagnets. Since the Hall viscosity can be probed experimentally through magneto-acoustic measurements, it provides a compelling method to probe the broken symmetries and topology of insulating altermagnets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出零磁场下的声子霍尔粘度可作为交错磁性的天然探针，通过理论计算证明霍尔粘度张量能明确区分交错磁体与铁磁体、反铁磁体，并揭示了应变空间贝利曲率单极子的存在，为实验探测绝缘交错磁体的对称性破缺和拓扑性质提供了新方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效区分交错磁体与其他磁有序态（如铁磁体和传统反铁磁体），因此需要一种新的物理量来作为交错磁性的指征。
AI.method: 首先从理论上论证霍尔粘度张量的有限元可区分交错磁体；随后在d波和g波交错磁体模型中微观计算霍尔粘度，分析其对电子能谱特征（如狄拉克点能隙、Lifshitz相变）的敏感性。
AI.result: 霍尔粘度对电子能谱特征高度敏感，这种敏感性的根源是应变空间的贝利曲率单极子，与交错磁体中动量空间贝利曲率的多极特征形成对比。
AI.conclusion: 霍尔粘度可通过磁声学测量实验实现探测，为研究绝缘交错磁体的对称性破缺和拓扑性质提供了一种有力的实验手段。

title: Challenging the $p$-type Paradigm: Intrinsic $n$-type Mobility in Antiferromagnetic Cr$_2$O$_3$
summary: Chromium oxide (Cr$_2$O$_3$) is widely considered a $p$-type transparent conducting oxide despite ongoing debate regarding its intrinsic transport character. Here, we resolve this question by computing phonon-limited electron and hole mobilities using the ab initio Boltzmann transport equation. We find that electron mobility systematically exceeds hole mobility over a wide temperature range, demonstrating that Cr$_2$O$_3$ is intrinsically $n$-type. Analysis of scattering mechanisms reveals that scattering with phonons affects electrons and holes similarly, and that the mobility asymmetry originates from the electronic structure, namely the larger effective mass and multi-valley character of the valence band. The intrinsic $n$-type character, combined with moderate hole mobility, enables bipolar transport and revises the role of Cr$_2$O$_3$ in transparent electronics. Additionally, our results on mobility complement previous studies on defect formation indicating that the commonly observed $p$-type behavior is extrinsic. These insights provide a complete chemical-transport paradigm for Cr$_2$O$_3$, re-evaluating its role in functional transparent electronic and magneto-optoelectronic applications

AI.tldr: 通过第一性原理玻尔兹曼输运方程计算，发现Cr₂O₃本质上是n型而非传统认为的p型透明导电氧化物，其电子迁移率在宽温度范围内始终高于空穴迁移率，迁移率不对称性源于价带的有效质量大和多重谷特性，而常见的p型行为是外在的。
AI.motivation: 解决关于Cr₂O₃本征输运特性的长期争议——它究竟是n型还是p型透明导电氧化物。
AI.method: 采用基于第一性原理的玻尔兹曼输运方程计算，考虑声子限制下的电子和空穴迁移率，分析散射机制和电子结构。
AI.result: 电子迁移率在所有温度下均高于空穴迁移率，表明Cr₂O₃本质上是n型；声子散射对电子和空穴影响相似，迁移率不对称性源于价带的有效质量更大及多能谷特征。
AI.conclusion: Cr₂O₃本质为n型，但空穴迁移率适中可实现双极输运；常见的p型行为是外在的（取决于缺陷），这修正了其在透明电子学中的角色认知，为功能透明电子和磁光电器件应用提供了完整的化学-输运范式。

title: Local and nonlocal STM transport signatures of spin polarization in second order topological superconductors
summary: We investigate numerically the spin and transport properties of two-dimensional second-order topological superconductors (2D SOTSCs) hosting a pair of Majorana corner states (MCSs). First, we show that MCSs in the considered setup are characterized by a distinct spatial distribution of electronic spin polarization in the direction perpendicular to an applied in-plane magnetic field, with opposite signs for each MCS. Such a property can be used to label MCSs in a pair by their electronic spin. We propose a comprehensive spin-resolved transport protocol for measuring such a spin texture and further detecting the braiding (exchange) of a pair of MCSs, a crucial prerequisite for topological quantum computing. To be specific, we show that the magnitude of local conductance and the sign of nonlocal conductance are precisely linked to the sign of the electronic part of the MCS spin density and the spin polarization of the probe. Moreover, we show that the proposed technique can be used to detect the spin density profile of higher-energy quasiparticle states, e.g., edge states hosted in the SOTSC. We showed that all analyzed features are highly robust to strong static disorder , which makes our findings a clear experimental pathway to verify the spin structure of MCS and other quasiparticles hosted in SOTSCs.

AI.tldr: 本文通过数值研究二维二阶拓扑超导体（2D SOTSCs）中的马约拉纳角态（MCSs），发现其自旋极化在垂直于外加面内磁场方向上具有特征空间分布且符号相反。据此提出自旋分辨的输运协议，用以测量自旋织构并探测MCS对的编织（braiding），为实现拓扑量子计算提供关键实验路径。
AI.motivation: 探测和操控马约拉纳角态（MCSs）的自旋织构及其编织过程，是拓扑量子计算的关键前提，但目前缺乏系统的实验检测方案。本文旨在提出一种自旋分辨的输运测量方法来解决这一问题。
AI.method: 本文采用数值模拟方法，研究二维二阶拓扑超导体中MCSs的自旋极化空间分布，并提出自旋分辨的局域与非局域电导测量方案，通过局域电导的大小和非局域电导的符号与MCS自旋密度及探测自旋极化的关联，来检测自旋织构和编织效应。
AI.result: MCSs的自旋极化在垂直于外加面内磁场方向上具有相反符号的特征分布；局域电导的大小和非局域电导的符号与MCS电子部分的自旋密度及探测自旋极化精确关联；该方法还能用于探测SOTSC中高能准粒子态（如边缘态）的自旋密度分布；所有特征对静态强无序高度鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的自旋分辨输运方案为实验验证SOTSCs中MCSs及其他准粒子的自旋结构提供了清晰可行的路径，对推动拓扑量子计算具有重要价值。

title: GPU-accelerated superiorization on constrained physical problems with SupPy
summary:
The superiorization method (SM) is situated between feasibility-seeking and constrained optimization. Instead of aiming at the minimum of a given objective function over a constraint set, it seeks a feasible point at which the objective function value is reduced - though not necessarily minimal - rather than hard targets, or in which a mathematically optimal solution is not strictly required. While the method has been investigated for several applications in physics, its broader use has been limited, in part due to the lack of openly available software for researchers wishing to explore it.
  In this work we apply superiorization to three problems from applied physics: seismic image reconstruction, low-dose CT reconstruction and intensity-modulated radiotherapy treatment planning. These experiments are conducted with SupPy, an open-source modularized Python toolbox developed for this work, which supports execution of feasibility-seeking algorithms and their superiorized version on both the CPU and the GPU. In all three cases the superiorized algorithms achieve favorable results compared to feasibility-seeking alone, with reduced noise in the imaging examples and lowered body dose in the radiotherapy plans. For the radiotherapy case we further observe that superiorization produces clinically viable plans on infeasible constraint sets.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了将上化方法（SM）应用于三个应用物理问题（地震图像重建、低剂量CT重建和放疗计划），并开发了开源Python工具箱SupPy。实验表明，上化算法相比单纯寻找可行解能获得更好结果（降低噪声、减少辐射剂量），且在放疗中能在不可行约束集上产生临床可行方案。
AI.motivation: 上化方法介于寻找可行解和约束优化之间，在物理领域已有应用，但因缺乏开源软件而限制了其更广泛的使用。本文旨在通过开发开源工具箱并在三个物理问题上验证上化方法的有效性，推动该方法的应用。
AI.method: 开发了开源的模块化Python工具箱SupPy，支持在CPU和GPU上执行可行性寻求算法及其上化版本。将上化方法应用于地震图像重建、低剂量CT重建和调强放疗计划三个应用物理问题。
AI.result: 在三个应用场景中，上化算法均优于单纯的可行性寻求算法：成像示例中噪声降低，放疗计划中体剂量降低。在放疗案例中，上化方法能在不可行约束集上产生临床可行的治疗计划。
AI.conclusion: 上化方法能有效提升可行性寻求算法的结果质量，SupPy工具箱为研究者探索该方法提供了开源工具。特别地，上化方法在约束集不可行时仍能产生临床可用的放疗方案，展现出实用价值。

title: Vacuum Moisture Swing Direct Air Capture: A Low-Thermal, Water-Managed Pathway for Scalable CO2 Removal
summary: Direct Air Capture remains highly energy intensive, with most systems relying on high-temperature regeneration of amines or metal oxides. Here we present the first comprehensive evaluation of a low-temperature DAC process based on a moisture-swing mechanism that reversibly captures and releases CO2 using commercial ion exchange resins. The proposed vacuum moisture swing, VMS, process replaces thermal regeneration with a low-temperature water vapor stripping step driven by vacuum evaporation. A cyclic model, informed by experimentally measured water and CO2 sorption kinetics, was optimized across air relative humidity of 20 to 80 percent and kinetic regimes of 0.5 to 2.0x baseline. Optimized VMS operation at 20 percent relative humidity achieves CO2 productivities of 0.2 to 0.6 kg CO2 per kg sorbent per day, comparable to or exceeding high-temperature amine systems without external heat input. Electrical energy required for gas and vapor flow and CO2 compression to 0.1 MPa ranges from 1 to 15 MJ per kg CO2, driven primarily by vapor flow in the stripping step. At a representative productivity of 0.5 kg CO2 per kg sorbent per day, energy demand is about 2.5 MJ per kg CO2, surpassing typical productivity, energy tradeoffs, but with water losses of 1.4 to 3.5 kg water per kg CO2 due to evaporation, similar to liquid-based systems. Water loss scales with productivity and decreases under higher humidity and faster kinetics. The VMS process manages water through vacuum-driven evaporation and condensation, enabling the use of non-fresh or saline water sources. This work establishes a low-temperature DAC pathway that integrates realistic CO2 and water transport with built-in water management.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于真空湿度摆动（VMS）的低温直接空气捕集（DAC）技术，利用商业离子交换树脂替代传统高温再生过程，在无外部热输入条件下实现了与高温胺系统相当甚至更高的CO2捕集效率（0.2-0.6 kg CO2/kg吸附剂/天），能耗仅为1-15 MJ/kg CO2，并具备水管理能力。
AI.motivation: 直接空气捕集（DAC）技术能耗极高，传统系统依赖胺类或金属氧化物的高温再生，亟需开发低温、低能耗的替代方案。
AI.method: 提出真空湿度摆动（VMS）工艺，利用商业离子交换树脂实现CO2的可逆吸/脱附；通过真空蒸发驱动低温水蒸气吹脱步骤替代热再生；基于实验测量的水和CO2吸附动力学建立循环模型，在空气相对湿度20%-80%及0.5-2.0倍基线动力学范围内进行优化。
AI.result: 优化后的VMS在20%相对湿度下实现0.2-0.6 kg CO2/kg吸附剂/天的产率，与高温胺系统相当或更优；能耗1-15 MJ/kg CO2，主要来自吹脱步骤的水蒸气流动；典型产率0.5 kg CO2/kg吸附剂/天时能耗约2.5 MJ/kg CO2；水损失1.4-3.5 kg H2O/kg CO2，与液态系统相当，且可通过真空蒸发冷凝管理非淡水。
AI.conclusion: 该研究建立了一条低温DAC路径，集成了真实的CO2与水传输过程及内置水管理能力，为低能耗碳捕集提供了新方向。

title: An integrable approach to macroscopic fluctuation theory for the multispecies SSEP
summary: We study the macroscopic fluctuation theory (MFT) of a multispecies generalization of the symmetric simple exclusion process (mSSEP) on the infinite line, in which particles of $N+1$ species -- including, possibly, a vacancy species -- exchange positions at unit rate. Working with the full, redundant set of coarse-grained densities $\bfrho=\{ρ_0,\dots,ρ_N\}$ keeps the relabelling symmetry of the model manifest throughout. We first extend the argument of Derrida and Gerschenfeld to the multispecies setting, showing that the cumulant generating function of the multispecies current between two regions of an arbitrary graph depends on the boundary densities $ \bfrho_L,\bfrho_R$ and on the fugacities $\bflambda$ only through a single scalar variable $ω$. We then formulate the MFT saddle-point equations for the mSSEP on the infinite line and show that they define an integrable system: they are of Landau--Lifshitz type, and a Zakharov--Takhtajan gauge transformation recasts them in AKNS form. Solving the resulting linear scattering problem by the inverse scattering method, we recover the cumulant generating function $F(ω)$ for the multispecies current, as well as the initial and final density profiles conditioned on a prescribed current fluctuation. In particular, we show that $F(ω)$ coincides with the function obtained by Derrida and Gerschenfeld for the single-species SSEP, now derived for an arbitrary number of species directly from the integrable structure of the multispecies MFT equations.

AI.tldr: 本文研究多物种对称简单排斥过程(mSSEP)的宏观涨落理论(MFT)，将其视为可积系统，通过逆散射方法求解了多物种电流的累积生成函数，并证明该函数与单物种SSEP的结果一致。
AI.motivation: 将Derrida和Gerschenfeld关于单物种SSEP的宏观涨落理论推广到多物种情形，保持模型的置换对称性，并利用可积结构解析求解多物种电流的大偏差函数。
AI.method: 首先论证多物种电流的累积生成函数仅依赖于单个标量变量ω；然后建立多物种MFT鞍点方程，证明其为Landau-Lifshitz型可积系统；通过Zakharov-Takhtajan规范变换转化为AKNS形式，并运用逆散射方法求解。
AI.result: 推导出多物种电流的累积生成函数F(ω)，证明其与Derrida和Gerschenfeld在单物种SSEP中得到的形式完全相同；同时得到了初始和最终密度分布。
AI.conclusion: 通过多物种MFT方程的可积结构，首次将单物种SSEP的电流大偏差结果严格推广到任意物种数，揭示了该模型普遍的数学结构。

title: Toric code made subsystem: a framework for topological subsystem codes using anticommuting quantum spin liquids
comment: 14 pages, 9 figures ; Comments and suggestions are welcome
summary: We introduce a framework of constructing topological subsystem codes based on the class of anticommuting quantum spin liquids described in [Phys. Rev. B 113, 064402 (2026)]. A canonical model from this class can be considered as a spatial modification of the toric code that voids its stabilizer code property. Rather, these models contain an extensive set of anticommuting local conserved operators that lead to an extensive ground state degeneracy. This degeneracy forms the basis of the subsystem degrees of freedom in the associated quantum error correcting code. The code inherits the many-body topological order of the quantum spin liquid, making it a topological subsystem code. We present two concrete and detailed examples for constructing these codes on a square lattice and a kagome lattice geometry, requiring weight-4 and weight-3 local check operator measurements respectively. In contrast to other subsystem codes, a unique property of these codes is the presence of an extensive number of local gauge qubits that are left undisturbed by the check operators apart from the logical qubits. Our construction provides a template for generating this new category of topological subsystem codes on different lattice or graph geometries, suitable for implementation on various quantum hardware platforms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于反交换量子自旋液体的拓扑子系统码构建框架，通过修改环面码得到具有大量局域反交换守恒算符的模型，利用其简并基态作为子系统自由度，在方格和Kagome格子上实现了权重为4和3的局域校验算子测量，并具有大量不受干扰的局域规范量子比特。
AI.motivation: 现有拓扑子系统码种类有限，该工作旨在利用反交换量子自旋液体的独特性质（大量反交换局域守恒算符和简并基态）构建一类新的拓扑子系统码，拓展可实现的量子纠错码家族。
AI.method: 基于一类反交换量子自旋液体的规范模型，将其视为环面码的空间修改（去除稳定子码性质），利用模型中大量的反交换局域守恒算符导致的简并基态作为子系统自由度，并在方格（weight-4校验）和Kagome格子（weight-3校验）上给出具体构造方案。
AI.result: 成功构建了一类新的拓扑子系统码，具有大量局域规范量子比特（不受校验算子干扰）和拓扑有序性，可在不同晶格/图上实现，适合多种量子硬件平台。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为在不同晶格或图几何上生成新型拓扑子系统码提供了通用模板，有望在各种量子硬件平台上实现。

title: Quantum Hall effect in three-dimensional lattice induced by Wannier-Stark-Landau localization
summary: We study the quantum Hall effect in a cubic lattice subjected to parallel electric and magnetic fields aligned along a crystal axis. The dual fields confine electrons in three dimensions with their classical orbits residing on the surface of a finite-size cylinder. In the quantum limit, the spectrum yields a three-dimensional generalization of the Hofstadter butterfly, featuring equidistant resonances near the spectral center and discrete levels near the boundaries. When the Fermi energy lies within these spectral gaps, the Hall conductance in the plane normal to the fields is quantized while other components of the conductance tensor vanish. Under open boundary conditions, this quantum Hall state exhibits topological chiral hinge modes protected by bulk Chern numbers. Our results offer a novel platform for studying the quantum Hall effect in both solid-state heterostructures and synthetic lattices.

AI.tldr: 本文研究在立方晶格中沿晶轴施加平行电场和磁场时的量子霍尔效应，发现双场将电子限制在三维空间，经典轨道位于有限尺寸圆柱表面。量子极限下能谱呈现三维Hofstadter蝴蝶结构，费米能位于能隙时霍尔电导量子化，开放边界下出现拓扑手性铰链模。
AI.motivation: 探索三维系统中平行电磁场下的量子霍尔效应，拓展传统二维量子霍尔效应的理论框架，并为固态异质结和人工晶格提供新的研究平台。
AI.method: 在立方晶格中设置平行于晶轴的电场和磁场，通过理论分析研究经典轨道（圆柱表面）、量子能谱（三维Hofstadter蝴蝶）以及边界态（拓扑手性铰链模）的行为。
AI.result: 能谱呈现三维Hofstadter蝴蝶，中心区域等距共振、边界区域离散能级；费米能位于能隙时，垂直于场的平面内霍尔电导量子化，其他分量消失；开放边界下存在受体Chern数保护的手性铰链模。
AI.conclusion: 该三维量子霍尔态为在固态异质结和人工晶格中研究量子霍尔效应提供了新平台。

title: Nanoscale Phase Distribution Governs Exchange Bias in Multiphase Magnetic Nanoparticles
comment: Main Manuscript: 30 pages, 5 figures. Supporting Information: 35 pages, 20 figures, 5 tables
summary: Exchange bias at ferromagnet-antiferromagnet interfaces underpins magnetic memory, spintronic devices, and nanoscale electromagnetic technologies, yet its behaviour in complex nanoscale heterostructures remains poorly understood. Here we uncover how exchange bias emerges in functional multiphase metal-oxide nanoparticles by combining gas-phase synthesis, advanced magnetic characterisation, and first-principles-informed spin-dynamics simulations. Using Ni-Cr/NiO nanoparticles as a model system, we show that exchange bias is governed not simply by the presence of ferromagnetic and antiferromagnetic phases, but critically by their nanoscale spatial distribution and interfacial topology. At 10 K, significant negative exchange bias (0.8 kOe) and coercivity enhancement (1.4 kOe) was exhibited; both decreased due to either Cr-segregation (at low Cr content) or to Cr accumulation inside the core (at high Cr content). The resulting competition between magnetic phases produces a temperature-driven inversion from negative to positive exchange bias and a crossover from exchange-dominated to dipolar interactions. By linking density-functional-theory calculations directly to spin-dynamics simulations of nanoparticle ensembles, we establish a predictive framework for designing exchange-coupled nanomagnets capable of operating beyond the superparamagnetic limit.

AI.tldr: 本文通过Ni-Cr/NiO纳米颗粒模型系统，揭示了多相金属氧化物纳米颗粒中铁磁-反铁磁界面交换偏置的起源，发现其不仅取决于磁相的存在，更关键地受纳米尺度空间分布和界面拓扑结构控制，并通过第一性原理与自旋动力学模拟建立了预测框架。
AI.motivation: 交换偏置在磁性存储、自旋电子器件和纳米电磁技术中至关重要，但它在复杂纳米异质结构中的行为尚未被充分理解。
AI.method: 结合气相合成、先进磁性表征和基于第一性原理的自旋动力学模拟，以Ni-Cr/NiO纳米颗粒为模型体系进行研究。
AI.result: 在10 K时观察到显著的负交换偏置（0.8 kOe）和矫顽力增强（1.4 kOe）；随Cr含量变化，交换偏置和矫顽力因Cr偏析或积累而降低；出现温度驱动的负到正交换偏置反转，以及从交换主导到偶极相互作用的交叉。
AI.conclusion: 建立了设计超越超顺磁极限的交换耦合纳米磁体的预测框架，将DFT计算与纳米颗粒 ensembles的自旋动力学模拟直接联系起来。

title: Spin-orbit coupling driven topological superconductivity in twisted bilayer graphene-WSe$_2$ heterostructures
comment: Main text (5 Pages, 4 PDF Figures) + Supplementary Materials (6 Pages, 2 PDF Figures), Comments are welcome
summary: Commencing from the low-energy Bistritzer-MacDonald continuum model of twisted bi-layer graphene (tBLG) with proximity-induced Ising, Rashba, and intrinsic spin-orbit couplings (SOCs), we construct the corresponding Bogoliubov-de Gennes Hamiltonian with conventional $s$-wave pairing and theoretically investigate the emergence of topological superconductivity in it. The latter can possibly be experimentally demonstrated in tBLG, Niobium and tungsten diselenide heterostructures. The topological superconducting phases, bearing an effective $p$-wave pairing profile and exhibiting inverted band dispersion, are protected by a bulk gap and are topologically characterized by Chern numbers. In the absence of intrinsic SOC, variation of the twist angle and other SOC strengths yield extended gapless, trivial, and topological phases, with phase boundaries exactly matching the closing of direct band gaps. The topological regime exhibits clear band inversion in the combined particle-hole and spin space, along with distinct Bloch localization profiles compared to the trivial phase. Including intrinsic SOC generates additional topological phases and eliminates the gapless phase, indicating the enhanced stability of the gapped topological superconducting regime in tBLG.

AI.tldr: 本文基于低能Bistritzer-MacDonald连续模型，研究了具有近邻诱导Ising、Rashba和内禀自旋轨道耦合的扭曲双层石墨烯(tBLG)中s波配对的拓扑超导电性，发现其可通过有效p波配对和能带反转实现拓扑超导相，并由Chern数表征；内禀SOC可消除无隙相并增强拓扑超导相的稳定性。
AI.motivation: 探索在tBLG与铌、二硒化钨等异质结构中，通过近邻效应引入多种自旋轨道耦合，能否实现拓扑超导电性，为实验上在tBLG中实现拓扑超导提供理论依据。
AI.method: 基于低能Bistritzer-MacDonald连续模型，引入近邻诱导的Ising、Rashba和内禀自旋轨道耦合，构建Bogoliubov-de Gennes哈密顿量，采用常规s波配对，通过分析能带结构、Chern数、Bloch局域化等表征拓扑超导相。
AI.result: 发现存在无隙相、平凡相和拓扑相三种相，相边界由直接带隙闭合决定；拓扑相具有有效p波配对和能带反转特征；内禀SOC产生额外拓扑相并消除无隙相，增强了拓扑超导相的稳定性。
AI.conclusion: tBLG中可通过多种SOC调控实现稳定的拓扑超导电性，内禀SOC对维持有隙拓扑超导相起关键作用，为实验实现提供了理论指导。

title: Real Quantum Chemistry With Complex Orbitals
summary: We follow up our study of basis set truncation errors for atoms in magnetic fields [Åström and Lehtola, J. Phys. Chem. A, 2023, 127, 10872]. Our previous study employed an approximate real-valued model. In this work, we implement a scheme to allow the use of complex basis functions and the true, complex Hamiltonian with linear molecules in a parallel magnetic field within the usual real-basis machinery of quantum chemistry. Our method performs additional unitary transformations before and after a conventional Fock build, thus allowing the reuse of existing software methods and algorithms. We apply our approach to calculations on low-lying configurations of the atoms $Z \leq 18$ in static magnetic fields up to 0.6 $B_0$. The calculations employ the uncontracted aug-cc-pVTZ and the benchmarking quality AHGBSP3-9 Gaussian-type orbital basis sets. We compare total energies obtained with real and complex orbitals using these basis sets to fully numerical ones at the complete basis set limit. We see that the states of the real-valued Hamiltonian are superpositions of the true eigenstates that are correctly captured by the complex calculations. Our results show that the complex basis machinery is necessary for targeting states with the correct symmetry for the studied range of magnetic field strengths. The novel tool is key for future work where we aim to optimize basis sets for finite-field calculations.

AI.tldr: 本研究在先前工作的基础上，实现了在平行磁场中允许使用复基函数和复哈密顿量的方案，通过额外酉变换重用现有量子化学软件。对Z≤18原子在0-0.6 B₀磁场下的计算表明，复基轨道对于正确捕获磁场的实哈密顿量态是必要的，为未来有限场基组优化奠定了基础。
AI.motivation: 前期研究使用了近似实值模型，但真实的磁场问题需要复哈密顿量描述。为了正确描述磁场中分子的电子结构，需要在现有的实基量子化学框架中实现复基函数方案，从而能够正确捕获具有正确对称性的态。
AI.method: 在常规实基Fock构建前后执行额外酉变换，从而重用现有软件方法和算法。采用未收缩的aug-cc-pVTZ和AHGBSP3-9高斯型轨道基组，对Z≤18原子在0-0.6 B₀静磁场中的低能组态进行计算，并将实轨道和复轨道得到的总能量与完全数值基组极限结果进行比较。
AI.result: 实值哈密顿量的态是真实本征态的叠加，复计算能正确捕获这些态。复基轨道对于在所研究的磁场强度范围内以正确对称性定位态是必要的。
AI.conclusion: 复基机械对于磁场中正确对称性态的靶向计算是关键的，该新工具为未来有限场基组优化工作奠定了基础。

title: An Iterative Dual-Channel Neural Quantum State Algorithm for Selected Configuration Interaction
summary: Accurately solving the electronic Schrödinger equation for strongly correlated systems remains a central challenge in quantum chemistry, where the exponential growth of configuration space limits the applicability of exact methods. Selected Configuration Interaction (SCI) algorithms address this challenge by adaptively constructing compact determinantal expansions, yet their efficiency depends critically on the quality of the sampling strategy used to identify chemically important configurations. Here we introduce the Handover Iterative Neural Quantum State (HI-NQS) algorithm, which embeds a classically trained autoregressive Transformer neural quantum state within the iterative sample--diagonalize--update framework of Sample-Based Quantum Diagonalization. A dual-channel Transformer architecture with explicit spin-up/spin-down cross-attention encodes fermionic spin structure as an architectural inductive bias, enabling expressive and physically informed wavefunction representations. After each subspace diagonalization, the resulting eigenvector is distilled back into the network through a factorized spin-marginal teacher signal, establishing a closed feedback loop between generative sampling and exact diagonalization. Benchmarks across a range of small molecules and a systematic nitrogen active-space series demonstrate that HI-NQS achieves chemical accuracy on all systems tested, with determinant-count scaling substantially more favorable than conventional CIPSI-based SCI for all but the smallest active spaces. All calculations are performed on GPU hardware without quantum computing resources, establishing HI-NQS as an efficient and scalable purely classical approach to the selected configuration interaction problem.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 HI-NQS 算法，将经典训练的自回归 Transformer 神经量子态嵌入样本基量子对角化框架中，通过双通道 Transformer 架构和自旋边缘教师信号实现高效的选定组态相互作用求解，在多个小分子和氮活性空间系列上达到化学精度，且行列式计数缩放显著优于传统 CIPSI 方法。
AI.motivation: 强关联体系的电子薛定谔方程精确求解面临组态空间指数增长的挑战，现有选定组态相互作用 (SCI) 算法的效率严重依赖于采样策略的质量，需要更高效、更具物理启发性的波函数表示方法。
AI.method: 提出 HI-NQS 算法：(1) 将经典训练的自回归 Transformer 神经量子态嵌入样本基量子对角化 (SBD) 的迭代采样-对角化-更新框架；(2) 采用双通道 Transformer 架构，通过显式的自旋向上/自旋向下交叉注意力编码费米子自旋结构作为归纳偏置；(3) 子空间对角化后，通过分解的自旋边缘教师信号将特征向量蒸馏回网络，形成生成式采样与精确对角化之间的闭环反馈。
AI.result: 在多个小分子和系统性氮活性空间系列上，HI-NQS 在所有测试系统中均达到化学精度，行列式计数缩放显著优于传统 CIPSI 方法（除最小活性空间外），且所有计算均在 GPU 上完成，无需量子计算资源。
AI.conclusion: HI-NQS 是一种高效、可扩展的纯经典选定组态相互作用求解方法，通过深度学习与量子化学方法的融合，为强关联体系的精确求解提供了新范式。

title: Field theories for Laplacian Growth
summary: Loop-erased random walks (LERW), the $O(n)$-model at ${n=-2}$ and Laplacian random walks (LRW) are three realizations of the same random process. While this equivalence holds on any graph, renormalization is possible only via the $O(-2)$-model. To generalize LRWs to $b$-LRWs or to Diffusion Limited Aggregation (DLA), a field theory directly on the Laplacian growth process is necessary. Here we construct an exact lattice action for LRWs and show that its perturbative expansion equals that of LERWs. We then generalize this approach to $b$-LRWs and DLA.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了环消除随机游走(LERW)、O(-2)模型和拉普拉斯随机游走(LRW)在任意图上的等价性，并构建了LRW的精确格点作用量，从而推广到b-LRW和扩散限制聚集(DLA)。
AI.motivation: LRW、LERW和O(-2)模型虽已知等价，但推广到b-LRW和DLA缺乏直接的场论框架，现有重整化方法仅适用于O(-2)模型。
AI.method: 构建LRW的精确格点作用量，证明其微扰展开与LERW等价，并将此方法推广到b-LRW和DLA。
AI.result: 成功建立了LRW的格点场论，并推广到b-LRW和DLA，使得对后两者的重整化研究成为可能。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为Laplacian生长过程（如b-LRW和DLA）提供了直接的场论描述，弥补了O(-2)模型方法的局限性。

title: Bobkingite, a new coupled sawtooth chain platform
comment: 8 pages main text, 11 pages including supplementary material; 5 main-text figures and 1 supplementary figure; 1 main-text table and 3 supplementary tables
summary: We investigate the mineral bobkingite, \ce{Cu5(OH)8Cl2(H2O)2}, as a potential realization of the sawtooth chain. Using \textit{ab initio} methods, we estimate the magnetic exchange couplings and find that bobkingite hosts quasi-one-dimensional sawtooth chains, with residual three-dimensional interactions strongly suppressed by the crystal geometry. Examining the full exchange network, we find that the classical model exhibits an extensive manifold of nearly degenerate states with emergent two-dimensional character, which spin-wave theory shows to persist to leading order in quantum fluctuations as Ising degrees of freedom. Unlike other sawtooth candidates, bobkingite has negligible vertical interchain coupling, preserving a one-dimensional degeneracy even in the presence of ordering, suggesting that any long-range order is weak. Thermal fluctuations may thus stabilize a finite-temperature classical spin liquid regime, with a cascade of transitions upon cooling into successively lower-dimensional degenerate states, making bobkingite a compelling platform for exploring sawtooth chain physics.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了矿物bobkingite作为锯齿链模型的潜在实现，通过从头算方法估算磁交换耦合，发现其具有准一维锯齿链结构、极弱的三维耦合，并展现出丰富的简并态和经典自旋液体行为，是研究锯齿链物理的理想平台。
AI.motivation: 寻找一种真实的材料平台来实现锯齿链（sawtooth chain）模型，探索其中可能存在的奇特磁性行为，特别是经典自旋液体和降维简并态。
AI.method: 采用从头算（ab initio）方法估算bobkingite中的磁交换耦合参数，分析完整的交换网络；使用经典模型和自旋波理论研究简并态及其量子涨落行为。
AI.result: bobkingite具有准一维锯齿链结构，三维残余相互作用因晶体几何被强烈抑制；经典模型存在大量近似简并态，具有二维特征；自旋波理论表明这些简并态在量子涨落下仍然保持为伊辛自由度；与其他锯齿链候选材料不同，bobkingite垂直链间耦合可忽略不计。
AI.conclusion: bobkingite是一种研究锯齿链物理的优异平台，可能通过热涨落实现有限温度经典自旋液体，并在降温过程中经历一系列级联相变进入逐次降维的简并态。

title: Photo-thermal origin of pulse laser induced orientation of crystallographic c axis in Tellurium thin films
summary: Recent studies have shown that the orientation of crystallographic c axis of Tellurium thin films can be controlled using picosecond long laser pulses. This method provides spatially programmable control of the crystal orientation and is therefore highly attractive for practical applications in functional optical and electronic devices. Previously, it was suggested that laser-induced selective melting and recrystallization can cause the laser-induced reorientation. However, this interpretation remains inconclusive due to limited data. To clarify the mechanism, here we systematically study Te samples under different irradiation conditions. We find that the threshold fluence for inducing optical reorientation depends on the number of laser pulses. The results agrees well with a minimal kinetic model based on the Arrhenius law. Using the model developed, we investigate the condition required to control the optic axis in other two-dimensional materials, such as black phosphorus, WTe2, and SnSe. These findings provide a guide for developing functional electro-optical devices based on anisotropic materials.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了飞秒激光诱导碲薄膜晶轴重定向的机制，发现阈值通量依赖于脉冲数，并建立基于Arrhenius定律的动力学模型，为各向异性材料的光电器件开发提供指导。
AI.motivation: 之前的研究提出激光诱导的选择性熔化和再结晶可能导致晶体重定向，但数据有限，解释不明确。本文旨在澄清这一机制。
AI.method: 系统研究碲样品在不同激光辐照条件下的行为，建立基于Arrhenius定律的最小动力学模型，并扩展到黑磷、WTe2、SnSe等其他二维材料。
AI.result: 发现诱导光学重定向的阈值通量依赖于激光脉冲数，实验结果与Arrhenius动力学模型吻合良好。
AI.conclusion: 该模型可用于预测和控制各向异性材料中的光轴方向，为功能型电光器件的开发提供指导。

title: Ductility Design Rules for Tungsten based Refractory High Entropy Alloys from Sparse Experimental Datasets
summary: Tungsten-based refractory high-entropy alloys (RHEAs) are promising materials for fusion applications but often remain brittle at room temperature because of tungsten's high ductile-to-brittle transition temperature (DBTT). To identify alloying strategies that improve ductility, we compiled a curated dataset of experimentally reported tungsten-containing alloys and developed composition-based, physics-informed descriptors for machine learning. Three classifiers were evaluated using nested cross-validation, and a support vector classifier (SVC) showed the best generalization for this sparse dataset. Shapley additive explanations identified the exchange-correlation parameter, valence electron concentration, pressure field, and electronegativity mismatch as the most influential features governing ductile-brittle behavior. Synthetic compositions generated within the convex interpolation domain of the training data were evaluated and visualized on pseudo-ternary diagrams to map predicted ductility trends. The model predicts that moderate additions of Ti, Ni, and Co increase the likelihood of room-temperature ductility, whereas high Cr contents promote brittle behavior. These predictions agree with published experimental observations, including Ti-assisted ductility through solid-solution and electronic effects and embrittlement in Cr-rich refractory alloys. Agreement between DFT-derived elastic descriptors and SVC decision-function margins further supports the physical relevance of the learned classification boundary. Although the available mechanical dataset remains limited and heterogeneous, the model captures experimentally consistent trends and provides an interpretable, physics-informed framework for screening tungsten-based RHEAs for targeted simulation and experimental validation in fusion environments.

AI.tldr: 本文基于实验数据构建了物理信息驱动的机器学习模型，预测钨基难熔高熵合金的室温延展性。支持向量分类器（SVC）表现最佳，识别出交换关联参数、价电子浓度等关键特征，预测Ti、Ni、Co的中等添加可提升延展性，而高Cr含量则导致脆性。
AI.motivation: 钨基难熔高熵合金在聚变应用中前景广阔，但因其高韧脆转变温度（DBTT）导致室温脆性严重。为寻找改善延展性的合金化策略，需要系统性的数据驱动方法。
AI.method: 收集实验报道的含钨合金数据集，开发基于成分的物理信息描述符，使用嵌套交叉验证评估三种分类器，采用SVC，结合Shapley值解释特征重要性，在凸插值域内生成合成成分并绘制伪三元相图。
AI.result: SVC在稀疏数据集中泛化性能最佳；关键特征包括交换关联参数、价电子浓度、压力场和电负性失配；Ti、Ni、Co的中等添加促进延展性，高Cr含量导致脆性；DFT弹性描述符与SVC决策边界吻合。
AI.conclusion: 尽管数据集有限且异构，模型能捕捉实验一致的延展性趋势，为筛选钨基RHEAs提供了可解释、物理信息驱动的框架，助力聚变环境下的靶向模拟与实验验证。

title: Hidden-ordered Dirac fermions
summary: I propose a Hermitian extension of the Lorentz-symmetric Dirac theory by complementing the associated Hamiltonian with another \emph{masslike} anticommuting Dirac operator. The resulting theory manifests the iconic linear energy-momentum relationship in any dimension ($d$) and hence the emergent nodal quasiparticle excitations are named \emph{hidden-ordered Dirac fermions}, which are symmetry protected and their responses are analogous to those in original Dirac systems, however, in terms of a renormalized (due to the hidden ordering) Fermi velocity. Typically, such a hidden ordering pushes any quantum phase transition into an insulation toward even stronger coupling in any $d>1$. However, depending on the internal algebra between the candidate insulating order parameter and masslike Dirac operator, the hidden-ordering may survive or disappear near the corresponding itinerant quantum critical point. I construct lattice models for such hidden-ordered massless Dirac fermions and outline promising platforms (numerical and experimental) to test these predictions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种隐藏有序狄拉克费米子理论，通过将哈密顿量与另一个反交换的质量类狄拉克算符互补，实现了洛伦兹对称狄拉克理论的厄米扩展，得到的准粒子激发在任意维度下都具有线性能量-动量关系，且费米速度被重整化。该隐藏有序化在d>1维度推动量子相变向绝缘体转变，其存活与否取决于绝缘序参量与质量类狄拉克算符的内部代数关系。
AI.motivation: 为了扩展洛伦兹对称的狄拉克理论，通过引入额外的质量类反交换狄拉克算符来补全哈密顿量，从而发现一种新的隐藏有序狄拉克费米子，并研究其对称性保护、响应特性及对量子相变的影响。
AI.method: 理论推导：对狄拉克哈密顿量进行厄米扩展，引入反交换的"质量类"狄拉克算符；分析维度普适性能量-动量关系；构建晶格模型；从代数学角度研究序参量与狄拉克算符的内部关系。
AI.result: 得到了隐藏有序狄拉克费米子，在任意维度下保持线性色散关系；费米速度被重整化；d>1时隐藏有序推动量子相变向绝缘体转变；隐藏有序在量子临界点附近的存活与否取决于内部代数关系。
AI.conclusion: 隐藏有序狄拉克费米子是一种对称性保护的新型准粒子激发，其性质类似于原始狄拉克系统但费米速度被重整化；为该理论提供了晶格模型构建方案，并提出了数值和实验验证平台。

title: A Givens-exchange ansatz for molecular variational eigensolvers
summary: Molecular ground-state energies help determine conformer rankings, reaction energetics, and electronic effects in computational drug discovery, but accurate calculations become difficult when strong correlation or large active spaces are important. Variational quantum eigensolvers estimate these energies by optimizing a parameterized quantum state, making ansatz design central to both accuracy and cost. We study a fixed-topology Givens-exchange ansatz that avoids architecture search. The circuit starts from the computational-basis state with the lowest diagonal Hamiltonian expectation and applies local RY rotations with two ordered all-pair Givens exchange blocks. Parameters are optimized using Hamiltonian expectation values, while exact diagonalization is used only after optimization to compute errors and fidelities. Across six fixed seeds, coefficient-verified LiH-6 and H2O-8 Hamiltonians, together with a BeH2-6 public-specification candidate, are chemically accurate in every run. The corresponding six-seed mean errors are 0.000000124 Hartree, equivalent to 0.000124 milli-Hartree; 0.000128558 Hartree, equivalent to 0.128558 milli-Hartree; and 0.000002152 Hartree, equivalent to 0.002152 milli-Hartree, respectively. On LiH-6 and H2O-8, these mean errors are lower than the published point errors of the compared quantum-architecture-search methods, while the ansatz uses a larger pre-compilation macro budget. The method is therefore an accurate, reproducible, and search-free reference template for molecular variational eigensolvers.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一种固定拓扑结构的Givens-exchange变分拟设，用于计算分子基态能量。该拟设避免架构搜索，在LiH-6、H₂O-8和BeH₂-6三个分子体系上均达到了化学精度，平均误差低于对比的量子架构搜索方法，是一种准确、可重现、无需搜索的参考模板。
AI.motivation: 分子基态能量对计算药物发现中的构象排序、反应能量和电子效应至关重要，但强关联或大活性空间场景下精确计算困难。变分量子特征求解器通过优化参数化量子态来估算能量，拟设设计对精度和成本至关重要，因此需要一种既准确又无需昂贵架构搜索的方案。
AI.method: 采用固定拓扑的Givens-exchange拟设：从计算基态（对角哈密顿量期望最低的态）出发，应用局域RY旋转，再叠加两层有序全对Givens交换模块。参数通过哈密顿量期望值优化，仅在优化后用精确对角化计算误差和保真度。
AI.result: 在六个随机种子下，LiH-6平均误差0.000000124 Hartree（0.000124 mH），H₂O-8平均误差0.000128558 Hartree（0.128558 mH），BeH₂-6平均误差0.000002152 Hartree（0.002152 mH），均达到化学精度，且平均误差低于对比的量子架构搜索方法。
AI.conclusion: 该固定拓扑Givens-exchange拟设是一种准确、可重现且无需搜索的参考模板，适用于分子变分特征求解器，在精度上优于需要架构搜索的方法。

title: Proactivity and pinning in the non-reciprocal XY model with vision anisotropy
summary: We study a non-reciprocal XY model on a square lattice, in which spins interact with their nearest neighbors through vision-induced anisotropic interaction. Such anisotropy breaks rotational symmetry and leads to the pinning of the spin orientation along preferred lattice directions. We systematically characterize this phenomenon for different interaction kernels, including modulated, sinusoidal, von Mises, and hard vision-cone couplings, and for two classes of microscopic update rules: Glauber and Langevin dynamics. A central result of this work is the identification and detailed analysis of two distinct contributions that naturally arise in the Langevin formulation, which we refer to as the reactive and the proactive term. We derive the corresponding equations governing both local fluctuations and the global orientation, and use them to characterize the mechanisms responsible for directional pinning. We show that both reactive and proactive contributions can generate global pinning, whereas their role in determining local pinning depends on the specific interaction kernel and may differ qualitatively. Our analysis clarifies the distinction between local and global pinning, explains the emergence of preferred lattice directions in the different models considered, and reconciles apparent discrepancies reported in previous studies. More generally, it provides a microscopic framework for understanding lattice-induced orientational selection in non-reciprocal XY models.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了正方晶格上非互易XY模型中，自旋通过视域诱导各向异性相互作用与最近邻耦合，导致自旋取向沿特定晶格方向钉扎的现象。作者系统地分析了不同相互作用核和两种微观更新规则下的钉扎行为，重点区分了Langevin动力学中“反应项”和“主动项”两种贡献，阐明了局部与全局钉扎的机制差异，为理解非互易XY模型中的晶格诱导取向选择提供了微观框架。
AI.motivation: 理解和解释非互易XY模型中由晶格各向异性引起的自旋取向钉扎现象，澄清以往研究中关于局部与全局钉扎机制差异的争议，建立统一的微观理论框架。
AI.method: 在正方晶格上构建非互易XY模型，采用视域诱导的各向异性最近邻相互作用；系统比较四种相互作用核（调制型、正弦型、von Mises型、硬视锥耦合）以及两类更新规则（Glauber动力学和Langevin动力学）；从Langevin动力学中分离出“反应项”和“主动项”两种贡献，推导局部涨落和全局取向的动力学方程。
AI.result: 识别出Langevin动力学中两种不同的贡献——反应项和主动项；两者都能产生全局钉扎，但对局部钉扎的影响取决于具体相互作用核且可能存在定性差异；明确了局部与全局钉扎之间的区别。
AI.conclusion: 本研究通过区分反应项和主动项，解释了不同模型中出现特定晶格方向的机制，调和了以往研究的矛盾之处，为理解非互易XY模型中的晶格诱导取向选择提供了微观理论基础。

title: Odd-parity electronic order near the semiconductor limit
summary: Identifying materials platforms in which dilute carriers experience strong Coulomb interactions is a central challenge in the search for interaction-driven quantum phases. In such systems, weak carrier screening can promote a variety of collective instabilities beyond the conventional Fermi liquid paradigm, including superconductivity, Wigner crystallization, and odd-parity electronic order. Experimental realizations of such dilute, strongly interacting electronic systems remain rare in crystalline materials. Here we report a spontaneous odd-parity phase transition in the phosphide semiconductor family $\textit{Ln}$Cd$_3$P$_3$ ($\textit{Ln}$ = La, Ce, Pr, Nd). Using optical second harmonic generation, we observe the onset of bulk inversion and rotational symmetry breaking accompanied by the emergence of an in-plane polar axis. Second harmonic microscopy reveals three domain variants related by 120$^\circ$ rotations, while ultrafast transient reflectivity measurements uncover a pronounced electronic reconstruction across the transition. Remarkably, the ordered phase appears only in lightly self-hole-doped compounds and is absent in insulating SmCd$_3$P$_3$, indicating an essential role for itinerant carriers despite their extremely low concentration. Guided by density functional theory, we develop a four-band model of the valence states and show that modest interactions can stabilize odd-parity electronic order. The resulting phase combines a spontaneous Fermi surface distortion with a momentum-dependent bilayer polarization that breaks inversion symmetry. Our results establish a route to interaction-driven parity breaking in dilute-carrier semiconductors and identify honeycomb bilayer systems as a promising platform for odd-parity electronic phases.

AI.tldr: 本文在磷化物半导体家族LnCd₃P₃中发现了一种自发奇宇称相变，该相变伴随体反演和旋转对称性破缺，仅在轻自掺杂空穴化合物中出现，揭示了稀薄载流子体系中强库仑相互作用驱动的奇宇称电子序。
AI.motivation: 寻找稀薄载流子体系中强库仑相互作用驱动的量子相变材料平台，探索超越传统费米液体范式的集体不稳定性（如超导、维格纳晶化、奇宇称电子序）。
AI.method: 利用光学二次谐波产生（SHG）探测对称性破缺，结合二次谐波显微术观察畴变体，超快瞬态反射率测量电子重构，以及DFT构建四带价态模型。
AI.result: 观察到体反演和旋转对称性破缺，出现面内极性轴；三个120°旋转畴变体；电子重构；有序相仅出现在轻自掺杂空穴化合物中，绝缘SmCd₃P₃中不存在。
AI.conclusion: 建立了稀薄载流子半导体中相互作用驱动宇称破缺的路线，识别出蜂窝状双层体系是奇宇称电子相的有前景平台。

title: Photon-Assisted Tunneling in Double Quantum Dot: Application of Scattering Theory
summary: We theoretically examine the photon-assisted tunneling (PAT) in a double quantum dot (DQD) in parallel when one of the quantum dots (QDs) is irradiated by an AC field. First, we formulate the PAT in a single QD by solving the time-dependent Schrödinger equation using the scattering theory. The QD has an oscillating energy level, $\varepsilon(t)=\varepsilon_0+eV_{\mathrm{AC}}\cosωt$, and is connected to two leads by the tunnel coupling $Γ$. We show that the resonant tunneling takes place through energy levels of the polariton, $\varepsilon_0+N\hbarω$ ($N=0,\pm 1, \pm 2, \cdots$), when $Γ\ll \hbarω$ (PAT) and through the energy level $\varepsilon(t)$ when $Γ\gg \hbarω$ (adiabatic transport). Then, the scattering theory is applied to the PAT in the DQD in the presence of magnetic flux penetrating between the QDs. We observe the Aharonov--Bohm effect not only in the main peak ($N=0$) but also in subpeaks ($N \ne 0$), indicating coherent transport through the polariton states. Our theory is also applicable to the DQD in the three-terminal geometry. We demonstrate the phase measurement through the irradiated QD and show that the measured phase shift changes continuously from 0 to $π$ around both the main peak and subpeaks.

AI.tldr: 本文理论上研究了直流磁场下平行双量子点中，当一个量子点受交流场照射时的光子辅助隧穿现象，通过散射理论求解含时薛定谔方程，分析了不同隧穿耦合强度下的共振隧穿机制，并观察到主峰与子峰的Aharonov-Bohm效应，证明了极化子态的相干输运。
AI.motivation: 探究双量子点中交流场驱动的光子辅助隧穿机制，特别是磁场作用下极化子态的相干输运行为及Aharonov-Bohm效应。
AI.method: 利用散射理论求解含时薛定谔方程，分别处理单量子点和双量子点中的PAT问题，分析弱耦合（Γ≪ħω，PAT regime）和强耦合（Γ≫ħω，绝热输运）两种情形。
AI.result: 1）在单量子点中，弱耦合时共振隧穿通过极化子能级发生（PAT），强耦合时通过含时能级发生（绝热输运）；2）在双量子点中，磁通诱导的Aharonov-Bohm效应在主峰（N=0）和子峰（N≠0）均被观察到；3）通过三终端几何结构实现了相位测量，相位偏移在0到π之间连续变化。
AI.conclusion: 该理论证明了极化子态的相干输运，可用于研究量子点系统中交流驱动下的量子干涉和相位测量。

title: Topological phase transition driven by in-plane spin rotation
summary: The intrinsic coupling between magnetism and nontrivial band topology in magnetic topological insulators makes external magnetic fields a powerful tool for manipulating topological states. However, conventional magnetic control mechanisms, such as driving magnetic phase transitions or fully reversing magnetization, typically demand large magnetic fields and lack continuous tunability. Here, we establish a symmetry framework for the reversible switching of topological states via continuous in-plane spin rotation, governed by magnetic point group constraints on the Berry curvature distribution. Using a two-dimensional kagome ferromagnetic Chern insulator as a prototype, we demonstrate that a 60°in-plane magnetization rotation reverses the sign of the Chern number, transitioning through a topologically trivial state. Crucially, micromagnetic simulations confirm that this spin-reorientation-driven switching operates under exceptionally small magnetic fields and on ultrafast timescales. This work provides a highly efficient, low-energy paradigm for the manipulation of topological states.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过面内自旋连续旋转（仅需60°旋转即可翻转Chern数符号）来实现拓扑态的可逆切换，相比传统磁场驱动相变或完全磁化反转的方法，所需磁场极小且速度快，为拓扑态操控提供了低能耗新范式。
AI.motivation: 传统利用外磁场操控拓扑态的方法（如驱动磁相变或反转磁化）需要大磁场且缺乏连续可调性，亟需一种低能耗、高效率的拓扑态操控方案。
AI.method: 基于磁点群对称性对Berry曲率分布的限制，建立面内自旋连续旋转切换拓扑态的对称性框架；以二维kagome铁磁Chern绝缘体为原型，通过60°面内磁化旋转实现Chern数符号反转，并利用微磁模拟验证低场、超快特性。
AI.result: 60°面内磁化旋转即可使Chern数符号反转，且中间经历拓扑平庸态；微磁模拟表明该过程可在极小的外磁场下以超快时间尺度实现。
AI.conclusion: 该工作提供了一种高效、低能耗的拓扑态操控新范式，有望推动拓扑量子器件的发展。

title: Perturbatively Corrected Linear Response Selected Configuration Interaction
summary: Selected configuration interaction (SCI) methods have emerged as powerful, lower-cost alternatives to full configuration interaction (FCI) for ground- and excited-state energies. Still, calculating molecular response properties with SCI remains a significant challenge. In this work, we introduce perturbative corrections to the linear response selected configuration interaction (LR-SCI) framework, using an order-by-order Epstein-Nesbet perturbation expansion through second order. We demonstrate that in this theoretical framework, the finite-order perturbative treatment preserves the pole structure of the parent variational LR-SCI theory, which means that although the method can be useful for static properties, it is not suitable for frequency-dependent molecular response properties. Numerical benchmarks targeting the static polarizabilities of water, ethene, boron hydride, and hydrogen chloride demonstrate systematic convergence toward the FCI limit for both ground and excited electronic states. While first-order corrections yield marginal improvements, the inclusion of second-order corrections substantially enhances accuracy over underlying variational treatments and diminishes oscillatory convergence behavior present in the parent variational LR-SCI method. Combined with extrapolation techniques, LR-SCI-PT achieves excellent agreement with high-level coupled-cluster references, establishing a powerful route toward near-FCI quality molecular properties for systems otherwise inaccessible to exact FCI treatments.

AI.tldr: 本文在线性响应选择组态相互作用(LC-SCI)框架中引入了Epstein-Nesbet微扰修正(至二阶),发展了LR-SCI-PT方法。研究表明,该方法的有限阶微扰处理保留了变分LR-SCI理论的极点结构,因此适用于静态而非频率依赖的响应性质。在H₂O、ethene、BH、HCl等分子的静态极化率基准测试中,二阶修正显著提升精度,结合外推技术可接近FCI水平的分子性质。
AI.motivation: SCI方法在基态和激发态能量计算中已取得进展,但计算分子响应性质(如极化率)仍面临挑战,需要发展高效且接近FCI精度的方法。
AI.method: 在LR-SCI框架中引入逐阶Epstein-Nesbet微扰展开至二阶,推导了有限阶微扰处理的理论形式,并分析了其对极点结构的影响。
AI.result: 静态极化率基准测试表明:一阶修正改进有限,二阶修正显著提升精度,缓解了变分LR-SCI的振荡收敛行为,结合外推可获得与高水平耦合簇方法一致的近FCI结果。
AI.conclusion: LR-SCI-PT为计算无法进行精确FCI处理的体系的分子性质提供了有效途径,但该方法不适用于频率依赖的响应性质。

title: Exact subsystem dynamics in the deterministic Floquet-PXP model
summary: The dynamics of local subsystems in a thermodynamically large quantum many-body system can be understood as effectively open as the system produces its own effective bath. The action of this bath can be characterised in terms of the so-called influence matrices. In generic situations, the complexity of these objects grows unfavourably with time, however, there exist solvable cases where influence matrices can be characterised exactly even in the presence of non-trivial interactions. Here we show that Rule 201, a deterministic version of the Floquet-PXP model, is one of these solvable instances. Indeed, it admits influence matrices given by a finite-dimensional matrix-product operator (MPO) that solves a finite set of algebraic conditions. We provide the solution, and characterise multi-time autocorrelation functions.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了Rule 201（Floquet-PXP模型的确定性版本）具有有限维矩阵乘积算子形式的影响矩阵，并给出了多时间自相关函数的解。
AI.motivation: 研究热力学大系统中局部子系统的动力学，理解其有效开系统行为及影响矩阵的特性。
AI.method: 通过证明Rule 201是Floquet-PXP模型的可解实例，展示其影响矩阵可由有限维MPO表示，并求解一组有限代数条件。
AI.result: Rule 201的影响矩阵具有有限维MPO形式，并成功表征了多时间自相关函数。
AI.conclusion: 找到了一个存在非平凡相互作用下仍能精确表征影响矩阵的可解实例。

title: Coexistence of static order and spin dynamics in an S = 5/2 frustrated triangular antiferromagnet
summary: Frustrated triangular-lattice antiferromagnets in the classical high-spin limit provide a paradigmatic setting in which the interplay of competing exchange interactions, anisotropy, and collective degrees of freedom can lead to unconventional low-energy excitations, anomalous criticality, and persistent dynamical responses. Here, we present comprehensive thermodynamic, $μ$SR, and neutron diffraction experiments, along with first-principles calculations, on a triangular-lattice antiferromagnet, MnSnB$_2$O$_6$, where Mn$^{2+}$ ($S=5/2$) moments form a nearly perfect 2D triangular network without any anti-site disorder. The Curie-Weiss fit to the magnetic susceptibility yields a moderate Curie-Weiss temperature of $-12$ K, indicating dominant antiferromagnetic interactions between Mn$^{2+}$ moments, which is supported by first-principles calculations. Specific-heat measurements reveal the onset of long-range magnetic order at $T_{\rm N}\approx 1$ K, which is ascribed to intraplane exchange interactions. The specific heat exhibits pronounced short-range correlations above $T_{\rm N}$ and an unconventional power-law behavior, $C\propto T^{1.37}$, deep in the ordered state, suggesting the presence of non-trivial low-energy excitations. Zero-field $μ$SR experiments down to 50~mK confirm the presence of magnetic ordering below $T_{\rm N}$, in agreement with thermodynamic and neutron diffraction experiments. The $μ$SR measurements detect persistent spin dynamics coexisting with static magnetic order. The temperature evolution of the order parameter down to 50~mK from neutron diffraction suggests that the ordered state is consistent with a 3D Ising-like antiferromagnet. This family of archetypal frustrated magnets offers a promising venue for the experimental realization of emergent phenomena governed by competing exchange interactions and exotic low-energy excitations.

AI.tldr: 本文通过热力学、μSR、中子衍射实验及第一性原理计算，系统研究了三角格子反铁磁体MnSnB₂O₆。该材料中Mn²⁺（S=5/2）磁矩形成近乎完美的二维三角网络，居里-外斯温度约-12 K。比热测量显示在T_N≈1 K出现长程磁有序，有序态下呈现非常规幂律行为C∝T^{1.37}，表明存在非平凡的低能激发。零场μSR实验证实了磁有序，并探测到与静态磁序共存的持续自旋动力学。中子衍射揭示序参量演化与三维Ising类反铁磁体一致。
AI.motivation: 探索受挫三角格子反铁磁体中竞争交换作用、各向异性与集体自由度相互作用导致的非常规低能激发、反常临界现象及持续动力学响应。
AI.method: 综合采用热力学测量（磁化率、比热）、μSR实验、中子衍射实验以及第一性原理计算，对MnSnB₂O₆进行多维度表征。
AI.result: 比热在有序态下呈现C∝T^{1.37}的非常规幂律行为；μSR探测到与静态磁序共存的持续自旋动力学；中子衍射表明有序态符合三维Ising类反铁磁体特征。
AI.conclusion: MnSnB₂O₆是一个近乎理想的受挫三角格子反铁磁模型体系，为实验实现由竞争交换作用和奇异低能激发主导的新奇涌现现象提供了有前景的平台。

title: Floquet-Engineered Chern Insulator in two-dimensional $d_{x^2-y^2}$-Wave Altermagnets
summary:
We investigate Floquet-engineered topological phases in two-dimensional $d_{x^2-y^2}$-wave altermagnets irradiated by circularly polarized light in the off-resonant regime. These materials exhibit large momentum-dependent spin-splitting governed by distinctive magnetic symmetries. Using a lattice model combined with Floquet theory, we demonstrate that irradiation induces the light-tunable quantum anomalous Hall phases with the Chern numbers up to $\pm 3$. The resultant phase diagram is verified by calculating the anomalous Hall conductivity and also the edge modes inside the band gap of a nanoribbon version of the altermagnet. Our findings establish d-wave altermagnets as promising platforms for realizing nonequilibrium topological states of matter.
  The low-energy continuum limit of the lattice-based Floquet Hamiltonian results in a linear and higher-order-in-momentum spin-orbit couplings, and also a Zeeman-like magnetization, all arising from light-induced virtual photon processes. The resulting higher-order spin-orbit coupling generates the additional gapless Dirac points which, together with the high-symmetry gap-closings, yield enhanced Berry curvature and high Chern numbers. The light irradiation effectively breaks the static $d_{x^2-y^2}$-wave magnetic symmetry mixing in an isotropic photo-induced $s$-wave correction.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了圆偏振光照射下二维d波交变磁体中的Floquet拓扑相，发现了光可调的量子反常霍尔相（陈数可达±3），并通过光诱导的自旋轨道耦合和塞曼效应解释了高陈数的产生机制。
AI.motivation: 探索在d波交变磁体中通过非共振圆偏振光照射实现Floquet工程化拓扑相的可行性，寻找实现非平衡拓扑态的新平台。
AI.method: 采用晶格模型结合Floquet理论分析光与物质的相互作用；通过低能连续极限推导有效哈密顿量；计算反常霍尔电导和纳米带边缘态进行验证。
AI.result: 实现了陈数高达±3的光可调量子反常霍尔相；光诱导产生了线性和高阶动量依赖的自旋轨道耦合以及类塞曼磁化；高阶自旋轨道耦合产生了额外的无质量狄拉克点，增强贝里曲率从而获得高陈数。
AI.conclusion: d波交变磁体是实现非平衡拓扑态的有前景的平台，光照射有效打破了静态d波磁对称性，混入了各向同性的光诱导s波修正。

title: Shape-Constrained Bayesian Active Learning of Self-Limiting Saturation Curves
summary: Self-limiting saturation curves, monotone responses that rise from zero to a plateau, govern gas adsorption, enzyme kinetics, dose-response pharmacology, and the growth per cycle of atomic layer deposition (ALD), yet mapping each curve from a handful of costly measurements is a shared bottleneck. The standard surrogate, a stationary-kernel Gaussian process, enforces no shape constraint: on sparse, noisy data it produces unphysical dips that corrupt both the inferred curve and the uncertainty used to choose the next experiment. We present an active-learning platform built on Bayesian monotonic I-spline regression, in which every posterior curve rises from exactly zero and never decreases, the plateau is set by a measurement at maximum exposure rather than a prior, and the input at any saturation level is read from the posterior by level crossing with no kinetic model assumed. Benchmarked isotherm by isotherm on five kinetically distinct families (Langmuir, dissociative Michaelis-Menten, sigmoidal Sips, logarithmic Elovich, and dispersive Kohlrausch-Williams-Watts), with ALD process development as the working example, the same fixed surrogate recovers every curve to within measurement noise without a single non-monotone posterior draw, and noise-free sweeps show the basis itself is near-exact across each family's regimes, locating its single capacity boundary at the sharpest sigmoidal onset. Driven by ordinary uncertainty sampling, the platform reaches noise-floor accuracy within a 20-measurement budget in every regime, in as few as seven measurements, whereas random sampling succeeds in only two of the five; the predicted pulse times err only on the conservative side, toward longer pulses, near saturation. Because the basis privileges no kinetic form, the platform applies wherever a self-limiting response must be learned from scarce data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于贝叶斯单调I样条回归的主动学习平台，用于从稀疏、含噪数据中准确学习自限性饱和曲线（如气体吸附、酶动力学、剂量-反应药理学和原子层沉积等）。该平台保证后验曲线严格单调上升且不下降，无需假设动力学模型，在五种不同动力学家族上的基准测试中表现优异，能在20次测量内达到噪声级精度，且预测误差偏向保守。
AI.motivation: 自限性饱和曲线广泛存在于多个科学领域（气体吸附、酶动力学、药理学、原子层沉积等），但当前标准替代方法——固定核高斯过程——不施加形状约束，在稀疏含噪数据上会产生非物理的下降，破坏推断曲线及用于选择下一实验的不确定性度量。因此，需要一种能保证单调性约束的主动学习方法。
AI.method: 提出基于贝叶斯单调I样条回归的主动学习平台，保证每条后验曲线从零开始严格单调上升、永不下降；平台通过最大暴露点的测量而非先验设定平台值；通过水平交读取任意饱和水平对应的输入值，无需动力学模型假设；采用普通不确定性采样驱动实验选择。
AI.result: 在五种动力学家族（Langmuir、解离Michaelis-Menten、S形Sips、对数Elovich、色散Kohlrausch-Williams-Watts）上逐等温线基准测试，固定替代模型恢复每条曲线至测量噪声水平，无任何非单调后验样本；无噪扫描显示基函数本身在每种家族场景中近乎精确。在20次测量预算内达到噪声级精度，最少仅需7次测量；随机采样仅能在五种中的两种场景成功；预测脉冲时间仅偏向保守（更长脉冲）。
AI.conclusion: 由于该基函数不偏好任何动力学形式，该平台适用于任何需要从稀缺数据中学习自限性响应的场景，为稀疏数据下的饱和曲线建模提供了一种通用、准确且保守的主动学习方案。

title: Modular molecular toolkit for photochemical energy conversion in a self-assembling nanocontainer
summary: Production of useful chemicals using photoelectrochemical biohybrid devices offers an environmentally friendly alternative to existing energetically demanding processes. These devices exploit light-driven charge separation, e.g. by a photosystem, and require efficient electron transfer to a tailored redox enzyme cascade. Here we demonstrate that electron transfer efficiency can be increased by confining the photosystem with the redox protein inside a self-assembling, virus-based nanocontainer. The photosynthetic system from the phototrophic bacterium Cereibacter sphaeroides and cytochrome c were conjugated to a bacteriophage P22 scaffolding protein and co-incorporated into the 50 nm diameter virus shell in vitro. The porous shell confined the macromolecular components for efficient electron transfer while allowing free exchange of small electron mediators. Sustainable and accelerated light-driven electron transfer between the encapsulated components was confirmed by optical spectroscopy. This self-assembly system presents a versatile platform for developing nanoreactors that combine photosystems with complex redox pathways.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用病毒外壳（P22噬菌体）构建纳米容器，将光合细菌的光系统与细胞色素c共封装，实现了高效的光驱动电子传递，为开发生物光催化纳米反应器提供了新平台。
AI.motivation: 目前光电化学生物混合装置虽环保，但电子传递效率是瓶颈，亟需开发能高效耦合光系统与氧化还原酶的新方法。
AI.method: 将Cereibacter sphaeroides的光系统和细胞色素c分别与P22噬菌体支架蛋白结合，在体外自组装形成直径约50 nm的病毒纳米容器，利用多孔外壳限制组件靠近以促进电子传递，同时允许小分子介体自由进出。
AI.result: 光谱学实验证实，封装后的系统实现了可持续且加速的光驱动电子传递。
AI.conclusion: 该自组装病毒纳米容器平台具有通用性，可用于开发将光系统与复杂氧化还原通路结合的纳米反应器。

title: Finite temperature precursors of Mottness in the Fermi Hubbard model
summary: We investigate finite-temperature precursors of Mottness in the repulsive Hubbard model above the spin-ordering temperature, using numerically exact determinant quantum Monte Carlo. We show that the finite-temperature crossover is accompanied by a pronounced suppression of charge fluctuations, despite the presence of a gapless single-particle spectra, demonstrating that Mottness first emerges via two-particle response in an anomalous metallic regime, before appearing in single-particle spectral functions. We further show that a gap formation in the density of states occurs through momentum-resolved redistribution of spectral weight across the Brillouin zone, that begins at the onset of anomalous metallic regime, rather than through gap formation in single-particle spectral functions at individual momenta. Upon doping, the anomalous-metallic regime generates transport and spectroscopic signatures characteristic of doped Mott insulators. This shows that the transport and spectroscopic anomalies of the doped Hubbard model do not require the presence of a fully formed Mott insulator at half-filling, but instead originate from the strong charge-response renormalization and spectral-weight redistribution that develop within the precursor anomalous metallic regime at half-filling.

AI.tldr: 本文通过精确行列式量子蒙特卡洛模拟，研究了Hubbard模型在自旋有序温度以上的有限温前驱体行为。发现在赝能隙或Mott绝缘体完全形成之前，系统首先在双粒子响应（电荷涨落抑制）中表现出Mott特征的"反常金属态"，随后才在单粒子谱函数中显现。这种前驱态来源于动量分辨的谱权重重新分布，且掺杂后会产生类似掺杂Mott绝缘体的输运和谱学特征。
AI.motivation: 理解Mott绝缘体在有限温度下如何从金属态逐渐形成，尤其是在自旋有序温度之上是否存在前驱体行为，以及这种前驱体的微观机制。
AI.method: 使用精确行列式量子蒙特卡洛（determinant Quantum Monte Carlo）方法，对排斥型Hubbard模型进行数值模拟，分析单粒子和双粒子响应函数。
AI.result: 发现两个关键结果：（1）在自旋有序温度以上，系统进入一个电荷涨落被显著抑制但单粒子谱仍为无能隙的"反常金属态"；（2）态密度中的能隙形成并非源于单个动量点的谱函数出现能隙，而是源于全布里渊区动量分辨的谱权重重新分布。
AI.conclusion: 掺杂Hubbard模型中的输运和谱学异常并不需要半满时完全形成的Mott绝缘体作为前提，而是源于半满时前驱反常金属态中强电荷响应重整化和谱权重重新分布。

title: Floquet Topological Phases and Anomalous Hall Signatures in Irradiated Two-dimensional $d_{xy}$-Wave Altermagnets
summary:
We study Floquet topological phases in two-dimensional $d_{xy}$-wave altermagnets driven by off-resonant circularly polarized light and subject to an out-of-plane magnetization induced via extrinsic exchange coupling from a proximate ferromagnet. Using a lattice Floquet formulation, we show that the system is governed by a driving parameter $β$ that controls the emergence of distinct gap-closing points and associated topological phases. For $|β|>1$, topology is dominated by anisotropic Dirac points at high symmetry points, leading to Chern phases with $|\mathcal{C}|=2$. For $|β|<1$, light-induced off-symmetry $G$ points appear in four families in the Brillouine zone, enabling higher Chern phases up to $|\mathcal{C}|=4$.
  Low-energy analysis reveals that high symmetry points host anisotropic massive Dirac fermions, while $G$ points realize generalized two-dimensional anisotropic Dirac points with fully momentum-dependent pseudospin structure, leading to distinct Berry curvature distributions. In the metallic regime, the anomalous Hall conductivity provides an experimental signature of these Floquet topological phases, exhibiting sharp features associated with Berry curvature accumulation near local gap-closing regions.

AI.tldr: 本文研究二维dxy波交变磁体在圆偏振光驱动和外禀磁化作用下的Floquet拓扑相，发现通过调节驱动参数β可在高对称点（|β|>1时Chern数|𝒞|=2）和光致非对称G点（|β|<1时Chern数可达|𝒞|=4）实现不同拓扑相，异常霍尔电导可作为实验探针。
AI.motivation: 探索在交变磁体中通过非共振圆偏振光与铁磁近邻耦合共同调控Floquet拓扑相，揭示光与磁性协同作用下的新奇拓扑态。
AI.method: 采用晶格Floquet形式化理论，结合低能有效模型分析，研究驱动参数β对能隙闭合点和拓扑相变的影响，并计算Berry曲率分布和异常霍尔电导。
AI.result: 发现驱动参数β控制拓扑相：|β|>1时高对称点各向异性Dirac点主导，Chern数|𝒞|=2；|β|<1时光致G点出现，Chern数可达|𝒞|=4。G点实现动量依赖的广义二维各向异性Dirac费米子，金属态下异常霍尔电导呈现尖峰特征。
AI.conclusion: 交变磁体中的Floquet工程可实现可调谐的高Chern数拓扑相，异常霍尔电导是有效的实验探测手段。

title: Lattice Reconstruction and Orbital Hybridization Suppress Magnetism in TaCo$_2$Te$_2$
summary: Structural reconstruction in low-dimensional quantum materials can strongly modify electronic symmetry and magnetic stability through orbital hybridization. Here, we investigate the interplay between lattice reconstruction, electronic structure, and magnetic instability in the layered van der Waals compound TaCo$_2$Te$_2$ using scanning tunneling microscopy and spectroscopy (STM/STS), non-contact atomic force microscopy (nc-AFM), angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy (ARPES), and density functional theory (DFT). While nc-AFM resolves a distorted hexagonal Te surface lattice, STM/STS reveal a pronounced square-like electronic symmetry that does not directly follow the atomic structure. ARPES further shows a strongly anisotropic Fermi surface and reconstructed low-energy states. Spatially resolved spectroscopy and orbital-projected DFT demonstrate that the bias-dependent STM contrast does not arise from a simple reversal between occupied and unoccupied states, but from the energy-integrated local density of states dominated by electronic states exhibiting opposite spatial contrast at selected energies. DFT calculations further show that reconstruction suppresses the magnetic instability present in the undistorted structure, stabilizing a nonmagnetic ground state through enhanced orbital hybridization. These results establish TaCo$_2$Te$_2$ as a model system in which lattice reconstruction reorganizes electronic symmetry and suppresses magnetism, highlighting structural reconstruction as a route for controlling correlated and magnetic phases in low-dimensional quantum materials.

AI.tldr: 本文利用STM/STS、nc-AFM、ARPES及DFT等多种实验与理论手段，系统研究了层状范德瓦尔斯化合物TaCo₂Te₂中晶格重构与电子结构、磁性不稳定性之间的相互作用。研究发现，nc-AFM显示畸变的六角Te表面晶格，而STM/STS却观察到明显的四方对称电子结构，ARPES进一步揭示了强各向异性费米面和重构的低能态。DFT计算表明，重构通过增强轨道杂化抑制了磁性不稳定性，稳定了非磁基态。
AI.motivation: 探究低维量子材料中晶格重构如何通过轨道杂化改变电子对称性和磁性稳定性，揭示结构与电子、磁性自由度之间的耦合机制。
AI.method: 结合扫描隧道显微镜/谱学(STM/STS)、非接触原子力显微镜(nc-AFM)、角分辨光电子能谱(ARPES)实验手段与密度泛函理论(DFT)计算，对TaCo₂Te₂进行多尺度表征。
AI.result: nc-AFM显示畸变六角Te晶格，STM/STS呈现四方对称电子结构；ARPES证实强各向异性费米面；DFT揭示重构通过增强轨道杂化抑制磁性，稳定非磁基态；STM衬度由能量积分局域态密度主导，非简单占据态反转。
AI.conclusion: TaCo₂Te₂是研究晶格重构调控电子对称性和磁性的模型体系，为通过结构工程控制低维量子材料中的关联和磁有序相提供了新思路。

title: Perfect Absorption in the Strong Coupling Regime via Degenerate Critical Coupling
summary: Perfect absorption (PA) represents a fundamental limit of light-matter interaction and a means to maximize nanoscale energy conversion. While PA is now a well-established phenomenon, both the theoretical feasibility and a practical mechanism for achieving it under single-beam excitation within the strong coupling regime is unknown. Through rigorous solution of Maxwells equations for a compact photonic crystal (PhC) architecture incorporating a two-dimensional semiconductor, we present a general method based on degenerate critical coupling for single-port PA of exciton-polaritons. At the crossing of two polariton branches, we achieve near-unity absorption exceeding 99.8 \% in a structure thinner than $100\,$nm. This effect is robust under realistic Gaussian beam excitation, and can be realized across different temperatures and excitonic materials by tailoring the PhC geometry. Our results establish a strategy for enabling efficient light-matter coupling, with direct implications for the development of metal-free, ultra-compact polaritonic logic devices, sensors, and energy-harvesting platforms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并验证了一种在强耦合体系中通过简并临界耦合实现单端口完美吸收激子极化激元的通用方法，在厚度小于100 nm的结构中实现了超过99.8%的吸收率。
AI.motivation: 探索在强耦合区域、单束激发条件下实现完美吸收的理论可行性与实际机制，填补该领域的空白。
AI.method: 通过严格求解麦克斯韦方程组，设计紧凑型光子晶体结构结合二维半导体，采用简并临界耦合方法实现激子极化激元的单端口完美吸收。
AI.result: 在两个极化激元分支交叉处，厚度小于100 nm的结构中实现了超过99.8%的近完美吸收，且在高斯光束激发下表现稳健，可通过调节光子晶体几何结构适用于不同温度和激子材料。
AI.conclusion: 该策略为高效光-物质耦合提供了新方法，对开发无金属、超紧凑的极化激元逻辑器件、传感器和能量收集平台具有直接意义。

title: Preconditioning Magnetic Systems in Kohn-Sham Density Functional Theory
summary: The convergence of the self-consistent field iterations in Kohn-Sham density functional theory can be significantly hindered by the presence of small eigenvalues in the dielectric matrix, which are often associated with electronic phase transitions in magnetic systems. In this work, we study this type of convergence issues and propose a new preconditioning scheme to mitigate them. Our preconditioning scheme is inspired by the Stoner model and based on a non-interacting susceptibility that neglects orbital variations. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on a range of ferromagnetic systems, showing that it can significantly reduce the number of iterations required to achieve convergence in the vicinity of magnetic phase transitions.

AI.tldr: 针对KS-DFT中磁体系自洽场收敛慢的问题，提出基于Stoner模型的非相互作用磁化率预条件方案，有效减少磁相变附近的迭代次数。
AI.motivation: 磁体系中介电矩阵的小特征值会严重阻碍自洽场迭代的收敛，需要新的预条件方法来缓解这一问题。
AI.method: 受Stoner模型启发，提出一种忽略轨道变化的非相互作用磁化率作为预条件子。
AI.result: 在多个铁磁体系上验证了有效性，显著减少了磁相变附近的收敛所需迭代次数。
AI.conclusion: 该预条件方案能有效加速磁体系自洽场迭代在相变区域的收敛。

title: Rashba and Electrostatic Control of Charge-Visible Spin Demons in Two-Dimensional d-Wave Altermagnets
summary: Spin demons in d-wave altermagnets are acoustic collective modes formed by nearly out-of-phase oscillations of spin-split quasiparticle populations. Their weak net charge fluctuation makes them long lived, but also makes them difficult to access with charge-sensitive probes. We propose a route to tune and brighten these modes in a two-dimensional d-wave altermagnet by combining Rashba spin-orbit coupling with electrostatic gate screening. Rashba coupling converts the spin-conserving problem into a generalized charge-spin response problem, in which mixed susceptibilities between density and spin channels become finite. As a result, the originally charge-dark longitudinal spin demon acquires finite charge spectral weight while remaining predominantly spin-like. Electrostatic gate screening provides an independent control of the Coulomb feedback and tunes the collectivemode dispersion and quality factor. Within a Rashba-altermagnetic continuum model and randomphase approximation, we show that the spin-demon ridge survives moderate spin-orbit mixing, develops a finite charge-visibility ratio, and retains dominant Sz character over the relevant control range. Parameter scans in Rashba strength and gate distance reveal a trade-off between charge visibility and mode quality, identifying regimes where the excitation remains underdamped while becoming more accessible to charge probes. These results establish Rashba spin-orbit coupling and electrostatic screening as control mechanisms for tunable, charge-visible spin demons in twodimensional altermagnetic platforms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出在二维d波交变磁体中，通过结合Rashba自旋轨道耦合和静电栅极屏蔽，可以将原本电荷暗的纵向自旋魔子（spin demon）转化为电荷可见的集体模式，同时保持其自旋主导特性，并实现对其色散和质量因子的可调控制。
