AI.motivation: 自旋魔子是一种长寿命的声学集体模式，但由于其净电荷涨落极弱，难以被电荷敏感探针探测。作者希望找到一种方法，使其变得可观测，从而在实验上验证和利用这类模式。
AI.method: 在二维d波交变磁体中引入Rashba自旋轨道耦合，将自旋守恒问题转化为广义电荷-自旋响应问题，使得密度通道与自旋通道之间的混合磁化率变为有限值；同时利用静电栅极屏蔽独立控制库仑反馈，调节集体模式的色散和质量因子。采用Rashba-交变磁连续模型和随机相位近似（RPA）进行分析。
AI.result: 自旋魔子峰在适度自旋轨道混合下得以存活，具有有限的电荷可见度比，并在相关控制范围内保持主导的Sz自旋特征。通过扫描Rashba强度和栅极距离，发现电荷可见度与模式质量之间存在权衡关系，存在保持欠阻尼同时提高电荷探针可及性的参数区间。
AI.conclusion: Rashba自旋轨道耦合和静电屏蔽可作为二维交变磁体平台中可调、电荷可见的自旋魔子的控制机制，为实验探测和操控这类模式提供了可行路径。

title: Thermal Rectification from Size-Dependent Phonon Confinement in Nanoparticle Assemblies
summary: Thermal insulation remains an important technological challenge across the vast number of applications, from living quarters to quantum technology. Here, we exploit the size-dependent modification of the phonon density of states arising from phonon confinement in nanoparticles to fabricate a simple phonon rectifier. The smaller of the two connected nanoparticles imposes stronger phonon confinement leading to rectifying phonon transport. This concept is extended to the macroscale by constructing two overlapping layers of differently sized nanoparticles, thereby realizing a macroscopic phonon diode. Following the localized heat deposition by laser light, the temperature profiles across a phonon-diode were measured by infrared imaging. Although the rectifying strength is moderate, the abundance of optimization possibilities makes this method promising for ultra-low volume thermal insulation at both the nano- and macroscale

AI.tldr: 本文利用纳米颗粒中声子约束的尺寸依赖性，通过连接不同尺寸的纳米颗粒制造了简单的声子整流器，并进一步构建了宏观声子二极管，实现了非对称热传输。
AI.motivation: 热绝缘在从生活空间到量子技术的广泛应用中仍然是一个重要的技术挑战，现有方法难以满足超低体积热绝缘的需求。
AI.method: 利用纳米颗粒中声子约束引起的声子态密度尺寸依赖性变化，将较小尺寸纳米颗粒与较大尺寸纳米颗粒连接，较小颗粒施加更强的声子约束从而整流声子输运；进一步构建两层不同尺寸纳米颗粒的重叠层，实现宏观声子二极管；通过激光局部加热并利用红外成像测量温度分布。
AI.result: 成功实现声子整流，整流强度中等；通过红外成像测量了声子二极管上的温度分布。
AI.conclusion: 尽管整流强度中等，但丰富的优化可能性使得该方法在纳米和宏观尺度上实现超低体积热绝缘方面具有前景。

title: Controlled chemical vapor deposition for synthesis of emerging Mo(W)Te2 systems
summary: The Group-VI transition metal ditellurides offer a rich platform for correlated and topological phenomena, yet their structural polymorphism and instability complicate the creation of single crystals and heterointerfaces. Here, we introduce a confined-space chemical vapor deposition (CVD) strategy that lowers the growth temperature window and, when combined with tailored precursor configurations and stepwise thermal ramps, enables the deterministic synthesis of high-quality single crystals, alloys, and lateral/vertical heterostructures. High-resolution aberration-corrected STEM provides atomic characterization of lattice-matched Mo(W)Te2 lateral heterostructure, revealing nearly atomically sharp, compositionally well-defined seamless boundaries. This approach avoids the thickness nonuniformity and structural limitations commonly associated with exfoliated samples, enabling reproducible fabrication of clean heterointerfaces and establishing a nearly ideal in-situ experimental system. Furthermore, scanning tunneling microscopy and spectroscopy (STM and STS) enable direct imaging of the seamless boundaries in Mo(W)Te2 lateral heterostructures, while uncovering their distinct real-space distributions of the local density of states. Our results establish a scalable pathway for engineering crystalline Te-based structures with controlled geometry and stacking, providing an essential step toward quantum and topological device platforms based on the transition metal ditellurides family.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种限域空间化学气相沉积策略，通过降低生长温度窗口、定制前驱体构型和阶梯式升温，实现了高质量Mo(W)Te₂单晶、合金及横向/纵向异质结构的确定性合成，并利用STEM和STM/STS揭示了原子级尖锐的 seamless 边界及其局域态密度分布特征。
AI.motivation: 过渡金属二碲化物存在结构多态性和不稳定性问题，导致单晶和异质界面的制备困难，限制了对其中关联电子和拓扑现象的研究。
AI.method: 采用限域空间化学气相沉积（CVD）策略，结合定制前驱体配置和阶梯式升温程序，降低了生长温度窗口；利用高分辨像差校正STEM和STM/STS进行原子尺度表征。
AI.result: 实现了晶格匹配的Mo(W)Te₂横向异质结构的原子级尖锐、成分定义清晰的 seamless 边界；STM/STS揭示了边界处局域态密度的实空间分布差异。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为可控制备碲基晶体结构提供了可扩展路径，避免了传统机械剥离样品的厚度不均和结构限制，是迈向基于过渡金属二碲化物的量子与拓扑器件平台的重要一步。

title: Hydrogen segregation around a straight screw dislocation in bcc iron
summary: The interaction between hydrogen and screw dislocations in bcc iron is central to understanding hydrogen embrittlement. A major challenge lies in the high-dimensional parametric landscape governing this interaction. In this work, we perform a comprehensive set of molecular simulations using a reliable neural network interatomic potential, systematically exploring hydrogen binding across dislocation core structures (easy and hard cores), site types, and concentrations. From these energetics, we construct a thermodynamic framework that quantifies the statistical relevance of the various trapping configurations, thereby significantly reducing the complexity of the problem. Our results show good agreement with the limited density functional theory data available in the literature. We further delineate the validity domain of an elastic dipole description of hydrogen-dislocation interactions, providing a simplified yet physically grounded modeling approach. Finally, we demonstrate that the easy-core configuration plays a key role in rationalizing experimental hydrogen solubility limits. These findings establish a consistent multiscale foundation for incorporating hydrogen-dislocation interactions into larger-scale models of plasticity and embrittlement.

AI.tldr: 本文利用神经网络势进行分子模拟，系统研究了氢与bcc铁中螺位错的相互作用，构建了热力学框架简化高维参数空间，发现易核构型对解释实验氢溶解度限至关重要，为多尺度建模奠定了基础。
AI.motivation: 氢与bcc铁中螺位错相互作用是理解氢脆的核心，但高维参数空间使得研究极具挑战，亟需系统性的方法降低复杂性。
AI.method: 采用可靠的神经网络势进行全面的分子模拟，系统探索不同位错核心结构（易核与难核）、位点类型和浓度下的氢结合能，并构建热力学框架量化各俘获构型的统计重要性。
AI.result: 与现有DFT数据吻合良好；界定了弹性偶极子描述的适用范围；证明易核构型在解释实验氢溶解度限中起关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 建立了氢-位错相互作用的一致多尺度基础，可融入更大尺度的塑性与脆性模型。

authors: H. S. J. van der Zant
title: Low-energy model for doped graphene nanoribbons
summary: We analyse in this article the many-body behavior of free-standing doped graphene nanoribbons where the chemical potential lies inside the bulk single-particle bands. We perform an exact mapping from both an extended and an on-site Hubbard model of the ribbons to a Kanamori model, which includes ferromagnetic exchange and pair-hopping interactions. We determine the resulting Coulomb matrix elements analytically, and identify their scaling behavior as a function of ribbon width and length. We propose a low-energy version of the Kanamori Hamiltonian to address the response of the ribbons to external fields, with a view to their use as transport channels in nanoelectronics. We find that the model and the proposed ribbon parameters can produce open-shell, high-spin many-body states that can lead to shell- and spin-blockade responses.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了自由掺杂石墨烯纳米带在多体层面的行为，通过将扩展和现场Hubbard模型精确映射为Kanamori模型（含铁磁交换和配对跳跃相互作用），解析确定了库仑矩阵元及其随带宽和长度的标度行为，提出了低能Kanamori哈密顿量用于响应外场，发现该模型可产生开壳高自旋多体态，导致壳和自旋阻塞效应。
AI.motivation: 理解自由掺杂石墨烯纳米带在化学势位于体单粒子带内时的多体行为，为其在纳米电子学中作为输运通道的应用提供理论依据。
AI.method: 将扩展和现场Hubbard模型精确映射为包含铁磁交换和配对跳跃相互作用的Kanamori模型，解析求解库仑矩阵元并分析其标度行为，构建低能Kanamori哈密顿量。
AI.result: 确定了库仑矩阵元的解析形式及其随带宽和长度的标度行为；发现该模型可产生开壳高自旋多体态，进而导致壳和自旋阻塞响应。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的Kanamori模型及纳米带参数能够描述石墨烯纳米带在外场下的响应，特别是产生可用于输运调控的自旋阻塞效应，对纳米电子学器件设计具有指导意义。

title: Giant and Broadband Circular Dichroism from Particle-Hole Symmetry Breaking in Weyl Semimetals
summary: Circular dichroism originates from symmetry breaking of material structure, leading to differential absorption of left- and right-circularly polarized light. However, circular dichroism in most materials is inherently weak and spectrally narrow, especially in the mid-to-far infrared. Here, we uncover giant infrared circular dichroism in the magnetic-field-forced Weyl semimetal Mn(Bi,Sb)2Te4, driven by extreme particle-hole symmetry breaking. Helicity-resolved magneto-infrared spectroscopy reveals circular dichroism exceeding 3000 mdeg (~130 mdeg/nm) with above-degree response extending over the 6-13 μm spectral range. The optical resonances are enhanced by a strong band nesting effect intrinsic to the Landau levels of type-II Weyl dispersion. A symmetry-based kp model reproduces these magneto-infrared responses and demonstrates that magnetization-induced asymmetric spin-orbit coupling generates particle-hole symmetry breaking, suppressing spin-up, parity-even wavefunction components in the valence Landau band and thereby producing pronounced optical helicity selectivity. Our findings establish particle-hole symmetry breaking as an effective route toward helicity-resolved optical control in quantum materials.

AI.tldr: 本文在磁性外尔半金属Mn(Bi,Sb)2Te4中发现了由极端粒子-空穴对称性破缺驱动的大红外圆二色性（>3000 mdeg），覆盖6-13 μm宽谱范围，揭示了II型外尔色散朗道能级中的强能带嵌套效应与不对称自旋-轨道耦合机制。
AI.motivation: 大多数材料在中远红外波段的圆二色性弱且谱宽窄，缺乏有效的巨圆二色性实现途径。本文旨在探索通过粒子-空穴对称性破缺来实现强且宽谱的红外圆二色性。
AI.method: 采用磁场调控下的外尔半磁Mn(Bi,Sb)2Te4，结合螺旋度分辨磁光红外光谱实验，以及基于对称性的kp模型理论分析。
AI.result: 观察到圆二色性超过3000 mdeg（~130 mdeg/nm），在6-13 μm宽谱范围内呈现大于一度的响应；发现II型外尔色散朗道能级中的强能带嵌套效应增强光学共振；理论模型表明磁化诱导的不对称自旋-轨道耦合抑制价带朗道能带中自旋向上、宇称偶的分量，产生强光学螺旋度选择性。
AI.conclusion: 粒子-空穴对称性破缺是实现量子材料中螺旋度分辨光学控制的有效途径。

title: Dirac fermions in non-Hermitian magnetic fields: Zero modes and index theorem
summary: In a Lorentz symmetric non-Hermitian (NH) Dirac theory, containing the canonical relativistic Hamiltonian accompanied by a masslike anti-Hermitian Dirac operator, when the associated NH parameter becomes spatially modulated it couples massless Dirac fermions as NH gauge fields. With specific choices of such resulting NH gauge potential, the system experiences NH magnetic fields. When a planar Dirac system encloses a finite flux of such NH magnetic fields, a manifold of spatially localized \emph{right or left} zero-energy eigenmodes appear in the spectrum, which we numerically anchor from microscopic realizations of NH magnetic fields on graphene's honeycomb lattice. Potential experimental platforms to test these predictions are discussed. Altogether, zero-energy NH flat bands of right or left modes promise fascinating future realizations of NH magnetic catalysis, strongly-coupled NH fractional topological phases, and NH chiral anomaly, to name a few.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了洛伦兹对称的非厄米狄拉克理论中，当非厄米参数空间调制时，会耦合无质量狄拉克费米子形成非厄米规范场。特定非厄米规范势产生非厄米磁场，在平面狄拉克系统中包围有限非厄米磁通量时，会出现局域的零能右/左手征本征模。数值验证在石墨烯蜂窝晶格上实现，并讨论了实验平台。预示着非厄米磁催化、强耦合分数拓扑相和手征反常等新奇现象。
AI.motivation: 探索非厄米系统中空间调制非厄米参数如何耦合狄拉克费米子，产生非厄米规范场和磁场，并研究由此导致的零能模及潜在的新奇物理现象。
AI.method: 构建洛伦兹对称的非厄米狄拉克理论，引入空间调制的非厄米参数，将其映射为非厄米规范势和磁场。通过数值模拟在石墨烯蜂窝晶格上实现非厄米磁场，计算零能本征模分布。
AI.result: 当平面狄拉克系统包围有限非厄米磁通量时，出现空间局域的零能右手或左手本征模。数值结果验证了非厄米磁场在石墨烯晶格上的微观实现。
AI.conclusion: 该工作揭示了非厄米规范场导致的零能非厄米平带，有望推动非厄米磁催化、强耦合非厄米分数拓扑相和非厄米手征反常等前沿方向的研究。

title: Magnetoresistance in chiral systems driven by inter-band spin-orbit coupling
summary: Chiral-induced spin selectivity (CISS), in which electrons transmitted through nonmagnetic chiral materials exhibit strong spin-dependent transport, has attracted growing interest for spintronic applications. However, a quantitative understanding of CISS remains elusive, partly because most previous studies rely on single-band models. In this work, we theoretically investigate multi-band effects on magnetoresistance (MR)-CISS, which is typically observed in experiments using magnetic conductive atomic force microscopy. To evaluate the spin polarization in MR-CISS, we simulate the nonequilibrium steady-state current using the Gorini-Kossakowski-Sudarshan-Lindblad master equation. We find that spin polarization exceeding 25\% can be achieved for realistic inter-band spin-orbit coupling strengths in the presence of on-site Coulomb interactions. These findings highlight the crucial role of inter-band spin-orbit coupling in the mechanism of CISS.

AI.tldr: 本文通过多带模型和主方程模拟，发现带间自旋-轨道耦合在CISS机制中起关键作用，可实现超过25%的自旋极化。
AI.motivation: 现有CISS研究多依赖单带模型，缺乏对CISS的定量理解，需要多带效应分析来解释实验中的磁阻-手性诱导自旋选择性。
AI.method: 采用Gorini-Kossakowski-Sudarshan-Lindblad主方程模拟非平衡稳态电流，评估MR-CISS中的自旋极化，考虑多带和带间自旋-轨道耦合及在位库仑相互作用。
AI.result: 在合理的带间自旋-轨道耦合强度下，结合在位库仑相互作用，自旋极化可超过25%。
AI.conclusion: 带间自旋-轨道耦合是CISS机制的关键因素，多带效应对于定量理解CISS不可或缺。

title: A Hybrid Quantum Mechanics Machine Learning Forcefield (QM/ML) Framework for Accurate Solute-Dislocation Interaction Simulations
comment: 25 pages, 11 figures in main text; supplementary information included
summary: Solute-dislocation interactions play a central role in controlling microstructural evolution and mechanical behaviour of structural materials, yet conventional atomistic modelling approaches struggle to combine the chemical accuracy with computational scalability. In the nuclear industry, these challenges become particularly acute, as experiments reveal strong correlations between solute segregation and irradiation-induced dislocation loops. However, theoretical insight remains limited because density functional theory (DFT) simulations are prohibitively expensive at relevant length scales, while traditional semi-empirical interatomic potentials lack the chemical fidelity required for predictive solute-defect calculations. Here, we introduce a hybrid quantum-mechanics/machine-learning (QM/ML) simulation framework that couples DFT with neural-network machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs), enabling accurate atomistic dislocation simulations at reduced computational cost. We demonstrate the QM/ML framework's capability by reproducing the experimentally observed Sn and Fe segregation to dislocation loops in Zr and investigating magnetically complex solute-dislocation interactions in steel. These results establish the approach as a transferable, high-fidelity tool for modelling irradiation-induced defect structures and benchmarking emerging MLIPs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种混合量子力学/机器学习（QM/ML）模拟框架，将密度泛函理论与神经网络机器学习原子间势相结合，在降低计算成本的同时实现高精度位错模拟，成功再现了Zr中Sn和Fe在位错环上的偏析以及钢中磁性复杂的溶质-位错相互作用，为辐照缺陷建模和MLIP基准测试提供了高保真工具。
AI.motivation: 传统原子建模方法难以兼顾化学精度与计算可扩展性，特别是在核工业中，溶质偏析与辐照位错环之间存在强相关性，但DFT计算代价过高，而传统半经验势缺乏预测溶质-缺陷相互作用所需的化学保真度。
AI.method: 提出了混合量子力学/机器学习（QM/ML）模拟框架，将密度泛函理论（DFT）与神经网络机器学习原子间势（MLIPs）耦合，实现精确且计算成本较低的原子尺度位错模拟。
AI.result: 成功再现了实验观察到的Zr中Sn和Fe在位错环上的偏析，并研究了钢中磁学上复杂的溶质-位错相互作用。
AI.conclusion: 该QM/ML框架作为一种可迁移、高保真的工具，适用于建模辐照诱导的缺陷结构以及为新兴的MLIPs提供基准测试。

title: Phase-Shifted Planar Hall and Magnetoresistive Responses in Weyl Semimetals
summary: The planar Hall resistivity and magnetoresistivity of Weyl semimetals are conventionally expected to exhibit $\sin 2φ$ and $\cos2φ$ angular dependences, respectively, where $φ$ is the angle between electric and magnetic fields. However, experiments reveal shifted extrema in the planar Hall signal and sign reversals in magnetoresistivity at $φ< π/4$. Here, using a diagrammatic Kubo-formula approach, we identify an intrinsic quadratic magnetic-field contribution to the planar transport response that is absent in conventional semiclassical description. This contribution introduces an additional term proportional to $\cos 2 φ$ and $\sin 2φ$, respectively, in transverse and longitudinal conductivities. Consequently, both planar Hall and magnetoresistive responses acquire a phase-shifted form $\sin 2(φ+φ_r)$ and $\cos 2(φ+φ_r)$, respectively. The same phase shift extracted independently from longitudinal and transverse responses quantitatively describes available experimental data. Our results establish a microscopic origin of the anomalous angular dependence observed in Weyl semimetals.

AI.tldr: 本文通过图解Kubo方法，发现Weyl半金属中存在一种本征的二次磁场贡献，导致平面霍尔效应和磁电阻的角度依赖性产生相位偏移，解释了实验中观测到的异常角度行为。
AI.motivation: 实验观察到的Weyl半金属中平面霍尔信号极值偏移和磁电阻在φ<π/4处的符号反转无法用传统半经典理论解释，需要新的微观机制。
AI.method: 采用图解Kubo公式方法，推导了平面输运响应中本征的二次磁场贡献项，揭示了横向和纵向电导率中额外的cos2φ和sin2φ项。
AI.result: 发现平面霍尔和磁电阻响应均呈现相位偏移形式sin2(φ+φ_r)和cos2(φ+φ_r)，且从纵向和横向响应提取的相同相位偏移能够定量描述实验数据。
AI.conclusion: 本文建立了Weyl半金属中异常角度依赖性的微观起源，为理解该体系的平面输运行为提供了理论框架。

title: HF Etching and Silanization: Evidence for the Role of Surface Hydroxyl Groups in Silicon Nitride Resonator Loss
summary: Silicon nitride $SiN_x$ nanomechanical resonators are central to sensing, quantum technologies, and fundamental physics experiments due to their exceptional mechanical quality factors (Q). However, as resonator thickness approaches the nano-scale, surface-related dissipation limits performance. Here, we investigate the role of surface chemistry in low-stress Si-rich SiNx membranes through a combination of hydrofluoric acid (HF) etching and trimethylchlorosilane (TMCS) silanization, correlated with surface characterization and mechanical measurements. Preliminary analysis by TEM-EELS, XPS, RBS/ERDA, and XRR reveals a native oxide surface layer (1-2 nm). Surface modification by HF and TMCS was subsequently evaluated using XPS, photothermal FTIR, contact-angle measurements, and intrinsic quality factor ($Q_{int}$) characterization. While HF etching effectively removes the native oxide and TMCS introduces hydrophobic $Si-(CH_3)_3$ termination, neither oxide thickness nor surface energy correlates with mechanical dissipation. TMCS treatments produce the largest enhancements, increasing $Q_{int}$ by up to 50%, whereas HF etching alone yields lower gains of 20-25%. These findings suggest surface hydroxyl groups as a key contributor to energy loss in $SiN_x$ resonators and demonstrate that chemical functionalization can substantially suppress surface dissipation.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了氮化硅纳米机械谐振器的表面化学对其机械品质因子的影响，发现通过TMCS硅烷化处理可去除表面羟基，使品质因子提升高达50%，而HF蚀刻仅提升20-25%，表明表面羟基是能量耗散的关键因素。
AI.motivation: 氮化硅纳米机械谐振器在传感、量子技术和基础物理实验中具有重要应用，但随着谐振器厚度降至纳米尺度，表面相关的能量耗散严重限制了器件性能。因此，探究表面化学机制以抑制表面耗散是提升器件性能的关键。
AI.method: 采用HF蚀刻去除原生氧化层，结合TMCS硅烷化引入疏水性Si-(CH₃)₃端基；利用TEM-EELS、XPS、RBS/ERDA、XRR进行表面表征，通过XPS、光热FTIR、接触角测量及本征品质因子（Q_int）表征评估表面改性效果。
AI.result: HF蚀刻可有效去除原生氧化层，TMCS引入疏水端基；但氧化层厚度和表面能与机械耗散无直接相关性。TMCS处理后Q_int提升高达50%，而HF蚀刻仅提升20-25%。
AI.conclusion: 表面羟基是SiNx谐振器能量耗散的关键因素之一，化学功能化（尤其是硅烷化处理）可有效抑制表面耗散，为提升纳米机械器件性能提供了新途径。

title: Strong coupling between propagating spin wave and microwave photons in a superconducting resonator
summary: We demonstrate strong coupling between propagating spin wave modes and microwave photons in superconducting resonator-magnetic thin film hybrid circuits. By fabricating the resonator directly on yttrium iron garnet thin films grown on rare-earth-free Y$_3$Sc$_2$Ga$_3$O$_{12}$ substrates, we achieve strong coupling of both Damon-Eshbach and backward-volume spin wave modes to the resonator, with coupling strengths exceeding both the magnon and photon damping rates. Furthermore, we observe nonreciprocal spin wave radiation of the hybrid magnonic mode in the Damon-Eshbach configuration, highlighting the potential for incorporating intrinsic spin-wave nonreciprocity into hybrid magnonic systems. These results open new avenues for integrating spin-wave magnonics with cavity magnonics, and for harnessing spin waves for potential applications in quantum information science.

AI.tldr: 本文在超导谐振器-磁性薄膜混合电路中实现了自旋波模式与微波光子的强耦合，并观察到非互易自旋波辐射，为自旋波与腔体磁子学集成及量子信息应用开辟了新途径。
AI.motivation: 将传播自旋波模式（磁子）与微波光子强耦合，并探索自旋波非互易性在混合磁子系统中的潜力，推动量子信息科学应用。
AI.method: 在Y$_3$Sc$_2$Ga$_3$O$_{12}$衬底上生长的钇铁石榴石薄膜上直接制备超导谐振器，研究Damon-Eshbach和backward-volume自旋波模式与谐振器的耦合特性。
AI.result: 实现了两种自旋波模式与谐振器的强耦合，耦合强度超过磁子和光子阻尼率；在Damon-Eshbach构型中观察到混合磁子模式的非互易自旋波辐射。
AI.conclusion: 该研究展示了自旋波磁子学与腔体磁子学集成的可行性，为自旋波在量子信息科学中的潜在应用提供了新方向。

title: Connection between the GKSL master equation and the Landauer formula
summary: We derive a current formula within the Gorini-Kossakowski-Sudarshan-Lindblad (GKSL) master equation formalism for a non-interacting system, and identify the conditions under which it reduces to the Landauer formula.

AI.tldr: 本文在GKSL主方程框架下推导了非相互作用体系的电流公式，并明确了其简化为Landauer公式的条件。
AI.motivation: 现有Landauer公式通常基于散射理论，作者希望在开放量子系统的GKSL主方程形式下推导电流表达式，并建立两者之间的联系。
AI.method: 采用Gorini-Kossakowski-Sudarshan-Lindblad (GKSL)主方程形式，对非相互作用体系进行电流公式的推导。
AI.result: 推导出GKSL框架下的电流公式，并找到了该公式简化为Landauer公式所满足的条件。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了GKSL主方程方法与Landauer输运公式之间的内在联系，为开放量子系统的电流计算提供了新的理论依据。

title: Specific absorption rate of uniaxial single-domain nanomagnets: stochastic spin dynamics versus linear response theory
summary: We compute the specific absorption rate of a uniaxial single-domain nanomagnet driven by an alternating magnetic field by two methods: i) direct numerical integration of the stochastic (Langevin) Landau--Lifshitz--Gilbert equation (the LLL approach), and ii) linear response theory (LRT) based on the Debye susceptibility with the Néel relaxation time $τ_\mathrm{N}$. We first analytically show that both methods are equivalent for small magnetic field amplitude, and then compute their deviation $Λ\equiv \mathrm{SAR}_{\mathrm{LLL}}/\mathrm{SAR}_{\mathrm{LRT}}-1$ as a function of the magnetic field amplitude for two temperatures chosen on opposite sides of the Debye resonance. One of the main results is that the sign and magnitude of $Λ$ are governed by the dimensionless product $ωτ_\mathrm{N}$, in addition to the linearity parameter $ξ=μ_{s}B_{0}/k_{B}T$ for the easy-axis geometry considered here. Indeed, below resonance ($ωτ_\mathrm{N}<1$), linear response theory overestimates the specific absorption rate. In contrast, above resonance ($ωτ_\mathrm{N}>1$, the regime typical of blocked nanoparticles), linear response theory can underestimate the specific absorption rate by up to $\sim70\%$ at $ξ\sim2$. We expect this work to provide quantitative guidance for the use of linear response theory in magnetic hyperthermia and related nanoscale heat-transport problems, and to serve as a single-particle benchmark for extensions to many-spin and interacting systems.

AI.tldr: 本文通过随机朗之万方程（LLL）和线性响应理论（LRT）两种方法计算单轴单畴纳米磁体在交变磁场下的比吸收率（SAR）。研究发现，两种方法在小场振幅下等价，但当场振幅增大时，偏差Λ由无量纲乘积ωτ_N（而非传统线性参数ξ）主导：低于共振时LRT高估SAR，高于共振时LRT可低估SAR高达约70%。
AI.motivation: 现有磁热疗和纳米传热问题中广泛使用线性响应理论，但该理论在大场振幅下的适用范围和误差大小尚不明确。作者旨在系统量化LLL与LRT两种方法的偏差，为实际应用中何时可使用LRT提供定量指导。
AI.method: 采用两种方法计算单轴单畴纳米磁体的SAR：(i) 直接数值积分随机Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert方程（LLL方法）；(ii) 基于Debye磁化率与Néel弛豫时间τ_N的线性响应理论（LRT）。通过解析证明小场振幅下两者等价，并数值计算不同场振幅和温度下的偏差Λ = SAR_LLL/SAR_LRT - 1。
AI.result: 偏差Λ主要由无量纲乘积ωτ_N决定，而非传统线性参数ξ。具体而言：当ωτ_N < 1（低于共振）时，LRT高估SAR；当ωτ_N > 1（高于共振，即阻塞纳米粒子典型状态）时，LRT可低估SAR高达约70%（在ξ~2时）。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为磁热疗及相关纳米尺度传热问题中线性响应理论的使用提供了定量指导，并可作为未来推广到多自旋和相互作用体系的单粒子基准。

title: Investigation on the temperature dependence of substrate-induced in-plane uniaxial magnetic anisotropy in Ni thin films grown on 128° Y-cut LiNbO3
summary: We report the temperature dependence of the substrate-induced magnetic anisotropy in continuous Ni thin films deposited at room temperature using magnetron sputtering on a 128° Y-cut LiNbO3 substrate. Ultrathin films exhibit a pronounced temperature dependence in magnetization, with as-grown films showing isotropic behavior and an unconventional hysteresis branch crossing at relatively low temperatures, whereas no branch crossing is observed in annealed films over the investigated temperature range, indicating suppression of the underlying mechanism. Temperature-dependent magnetization measurements show that post-deposition annealing establishes uniaxial anisotropy with well-defined easy and hard axes, whose strength evolves with temperature due to the nature of residual strain governed by both lattice mismatch and coefficient of thermal expansion (CTE) mismatch between the Ni film and the 128° Y-cut substrate, independent of film thickness for both 5 nm and 100 nm films. The emergence of this anisotropy following annealing indicates enhanced magnetoelastic coupling at the film-substrate interface, as the magnetic response begins to follow the anisotropic strain imposed by lattice mismatch and CTE mismatch.

AI.tldr: 研究了在128° Y切LiNbO3基底上沉积的Ni薄膜中，退火后由基底引起的磁各向异性及其温度依赖性。超薄薄膜在低温下表现出非常规的磁滞分支交叉，而退火后该现象被抑制，并建立了明确的单轴各向异性，其强度受晶格失配和热膨胀系数失配产生的残余应变控制。
AI.motivation: 探索Ni薄膜在压电基底128° Y-cut LiNbO3上的磁各向异性温度依赖性，特别是退火处理对磁各向异性的影响机制。
AI.method: 使用磁控溅射在室温下将Ni薄膜沉积在128° Y-cut LiNbO3基底上，测量了5 nm和100 nm薄膜在退火前后的磁化强度温度依赖性，分析磁滞回线和各向异性演化。
AI.result: 超薄Ni薄膜在低温下出现各向同性行为和非常规的磁滞分支交叉，退火后该现象消失。退火后建立了明确的单轴各向异性，其强度随温度变化，受晶格失配和CTE失配导致的残余应变控制，且与薄膜厚度（5 nm和100 nm）无关。
AI.conclusion: 退火增强了薄膜-基底界面的磁弹性耦合，使磁响应开始遵循由晶格失配和CTE失配施加的各向异性应变，从而形成稳定的单轴磁各向异性。

title: 3D Imaging of Complex Skyrmion and Hopf Topologies in an Extended Sample
summary: Spin textures are key for emergent magnetic phenomena such as topological protection and underpin novel spintronic device paradigms based on racetrack memory, logic gates, and neuromorphic computing. Using a coherent diffractive imaging technique called vector ptycho-tomography, in combination with algorithms that are robust to noise, we image the 3D magnetic texture of skyrmion and Hopf topologies with no prior assumptions about the sample. This directly reveals experimentally for the first time an extended 3D skyrmion lattice, including the domain wall shape, topological charge, helicity, and Hopf index. Our findings demonstrate experimentally that dipole stabilized skyrmions in Fe/Gd multilayers exhibit barrel-shaped skyrmion tubes with a twisted helicity, transitioning from N$é$el-type winding at the surfaces to both clockwise and counterclockwise Bloch-type winding in the bulk, that can also be described as fractional hopfions. We image a lattice of 24 skyrmions with topological charge 1, average depth-dependent domain wall width of 23 to 40 nm, depth-dependent twisted helicity from $\pm$155$°$ to $\pm$30$°$, and fractional Hopf index of $\pm$0.3. Over 10 TB of data were analyzed to yield a fully-resolved 3D reconstruction over a >0.4 $μ$m$^3$ volume, with high fidelity down to the Nyquist limit of 8 nm. This method fills a key gap in the current landscape of magnetic imaging by enabling high-resolution, element-specific 3D reconstructions of full-field extended spin textures - offering a new route for exploring the topological complexity of magnetic materials in three dimensions.

AI.tldr: 本文利用矢量叠层断层扫描（vector ptycho-tomography）技术，首次实验实现了对三维skyrmion和Hopf拓扑结构的无假设成像，揭示了Fe/Gd多层膜中skyrmion的桶形管状结构、扭曲螺旋性以及分数Hopf子特征。
AI.motivation: 现有磁成像技术难以对三维自旋纹理进行高分辨率、无假设的完整重建，限制了对拓扑磁性材料中复杂三维结构的理解。
AI.method: 采用相干衍射成像技术（矢量叠层断层扫描）结合抗噪声算法，对Fe/Gd多层膜中的skyrmion和Hopf拓扑进行三维无假设成像，处理超10TB数据得到高保真度重建。
AI.result: 首次实验展示了三维skyrmion晶格（24个skyrmion），揭示了从表面Néel型到体块Bloch型（双向）的扭曲螺旋性转换，测得域壁宽度23-40nm、螺旋性±155°至±30°、拓扑电荷1、分数Hopf指数±0.3，重建体积>0.4μm³，分辨率达8nm。
AI.conclusion: 该技术填补了当前磁成像领域的空白，实现了高分辨率、元素特异性的三维全视场自旋纹理重建，为探索磁性材料的三维拓扑复杂性提供了新途径。
